description:
About the job

We are looking for a Manager, Partner Product and Delivery, who will join our team spread across the globe, and help manage Spotify's important Premium Partnerships projects in Latin America. You will have the operational and day-to-day responsibility to manage the technical implementation and performance of the partnerships. You will report directly to the Associate Director, Partner Product and Delivery.

What You'll Do


Participate in initial discussions with potential partners, explaining how partners can distribute premium offerings in different ways.
Work with the business team on the technical setup of the partnership.
Ensure that Spotify's commitments in a partner relationship are delivered, as well as follow-up on the partner's commitments.
Document all actions with partners for keeping track of changes.
Develop our tooling together with R&D to make sure we can scale the business.


Who You Are


Documented working experience within telecom, Internet start-up, media or the digital music industry.
Proficient in written and spoken English and Spanish.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
You are proficient with REST APIs, SQL and big data analytics such as BigQuery, product and project tools such as JIRA and Github, productivity tools such as Gemini, ChatGPT, and common understanding of AI functionality, Unix and Shell scripting.
Experience in writing software in one or more languages, such as Java or Python.
A self-motivated can-do demeanor, you won’t be afraid to step in when needed.
You understand that collaboration and team play is key to success.
Strong presentation skills and shown success in working directly with partners.
A consistent track record in technical leadership, explaining complex relations both to technical and business people.
Experience working under deadlines and prioritizing multiple projects simultaneously.
Willing to travel, mainly Latin America.


Where You'll Be


For this role, the preferred locations are Mexico City, or Sao Paolo. We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in-person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.
This team operates within the Eastern Standard time zone for collaboration.


Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.

At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice

Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Marketing Strategy Consultant (PowerPoint Strategy) (Remote)
skills: Role: Marketing Strategy Consultant (PowerPoint Strategy) (Remote)

Payout: Competitive, based on experience
description:
About the job

Role: Marketing Strategy Consultant (PowerPoint Strategy) (Remote)
Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
Payout: Competitive, based on experience




Role Overview:

This role involves creating and refining PowerPoint presentations to support strategic marketing initiatives for clients in the technology and artificial intelligence sectors. You will translate complex market analysis, competitive insights, and business recommendations into clear, visually compelling decks for executive audiences. The work directly influences high-stakes business decisions, ensuring stakeholders can act on data-driven insights efficiently.




Key Responsibilities:

• Develop high-impact PowerPoint presentations tailored to marketing strategy briefs for AI and tech clients.

• Structure presentations to highlight key findings, market trends, and strategic recommendations with data visualization.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather content, refine messaging, and ensure alignment with business objectives.

• Incorporate feedback from stakeholders to iterate and finalize presentation materials for client delivery.

• Maintain consistency in design, branding, and storytelling across multiple presentation versions.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Expert-level proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint with strong design and layout skills for business presentations.

• 3+ years of experience creating marketing or business strategy presentations for technology or AI-focused audiences.

• Ability to distill complex technical concepts into clear, audience-appropriate visual narratives using charts, diagrams, and infographics.

• Experience working with market research, competitive analysis, or strategic consulting deliverables in a remote setting.

• Strong communication skills to coordinate with teams and integrate feedback efficiently.




More About the Opportunity:

This role supports a global leader in AI and technology marketing, contributing to high-visibility client projects that shape industry strategies. You will have the flexibility to work from anywhere while delivering presentations that drive measurable business outcomes. The scope includes short-term contracts with potential for ongoing engagement based on project needs.




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.




Apply Now!

title: Founding Growth Lead
skills: If you've taken an app from quiet to growing and want to do it again as an owner, not an employee — message me.
description:
About the job

I'm hiring a Founding Growth Lead for TalkPilot.




TalkPilot is an AI conversation co-pilot for iOS, Mac, and Apple Watch. The product is live and it's good. Distribution is the problem — and that's the entire job.




I'm a strong builder and a weak distributor. I need the opposite of me: someone who wakes up thinking about acquisition channels, activation, and retention curves, and knows how to turn a launched app into a growing one.




What you'd own:

 → The full growth function — paid (Apple Search Ads, Meta), ASO, organic, content, lifecycle

 → Finding the one channel that actually works and pouring fuel on it

 → The numbers: CAC, install→paid conversion, retention




This is a founding role. The equity is real and meaningful. The salary is early-stage and below what a funded company pays — that's the trade for ownership. Mexico City preferred, remote possible for the right person.




If you've taken an app from quiet to growing and want to do it again as an owner, not an employee — message me.

title: Talent Account Executive 1
description:
About the job

LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.



Join us to transform the way the world works.





Job Description



This role will be based in Mexico City.



At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team. 



LinkedIn is looking for a Talent Solutions Account Executive I (TAE1) to join our New Business team in Mexico City. This role is focused on driving new customer acquisition across a high-volume SMB territory, building strong pipeline through outbound prospecting, and closing new business opportunities across Hiring and Learning solutions. 



Success in this role requires strong discipline in pipeline management, excellent time management, and the ability to prioritize effectively across a large number of accounts and opportunities. The ideal candidate is highly organized, action-oriented, collaborative, leverages AI and data to increase productivity, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-activity sales environment. While the territory is primarily SMB-focused, the ability to identify and close larger strategic opportunities is considered a strong differentiator. 



Responsibilities:



• Own new business acquisition within a defined SMB territory, ensuring strong account coverage and prioritization of the highest-potential opportunities 

• Develop and execute a territory strategy focused on scale, efficiency, and consistent pipeline generation 

• Generate pipeline through proactive outbound prospecting (self-prospection and in partnership with SDs + partners) and effectively manage inbound opportunities 

• Build and maintain a strong, healthy pipeline across all funnel stages, ensuring high activity, progression, and conversion 

• Manage a high volume of opportunities simultaneously, with strong organization, time management, and prioritization discipline 

• Run effective discovery conversations to understand customer needs and position Hiring and Learning solutions accordingly 

• Execute pilot-led sales motions, including onboarding, engagement, and conversion into long-term partnerships 

• Maintain accurate forecasting and high standards of CRM hygiene 

• Consistently meet or exceed quota targets through strong execution and disciplined funnel management 

• Identify and drive cross-sell opportunities, especially expanding into Learning solutions 

• Identify larger strategic opportunities within the territory and navigate them effectively when present 

• Leverage AI tools and data insights to improve productivity, prospecting quality, and deal execution 

• Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (SDs, ADs, Marketing, Partners) to maximize opportunity creation and success 

• Share market insights and contribute to the development of team best practices





Qualifications



Basic Qualifications:



• Fluency in Spanish and English 

• 3+ years of sales experience 



Preferred Qualifications:



• Proven track record of closing new business in B2B/SaaS environments 

• Experience with HR tech, recruiting solutions, or software sales 

• Strong prospecting, organization, and pipeline management skills 

• Experience managing high-volume sales cycles with efficiency and consistency 

• Data-driven mindset with ability to prioritize and make informed decisions 



Suggested Skills 



• Pipeline Management 

• Territory Planning & Prioritization 

• Time & Volume Management 

• Prospecting Excellence 

• Pilot Management 

• AI Usage for Sales Productivity 

• Consultative / Value-Based Selling 

• Forecasting 

• Cross-functional Collaboration 

• Opportunity Qualification 





Additional Information



Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates 



Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/candidate-portal.

Accommodations: If you need an accommodation during the application process, email recruitment@onenergystorage.com
Benefits vary by role and location and are subject to change.
description:
About the job

ON.energy is building the power infrastructure that makes the AI era possible. As AI demand surges past what the grid and traditional data centers can support, ON.energy provides a new class of power technology proven at gigawatt scale and trusted by the world’s leading cloud and AI companies. Our systems are already deployed across 2.5 GW of hyper-scale campuses, validated by top U.S. national labs, and certified for grid-safe operation by major utilities. With real products in the field, we’re scaling faster than the grid can, transforming power from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage for the companies building the future.

We are looking for a Marketing manager to design, execute, and lead the marketing strategy for ON.energy in the LATAM region, positioning the brand and its UPS solutions portfolio for Artificial Intelligence applications in markets with high demand for mission-critical infrastructure. Generate awareness, credibility, and qualified demand in a market where brand recognition is still emerging, reporting to the VP for LATAM and acting as the direct liaison between the region and the Corporate Marketing team in the U.S., ensuring global brand consistency with local relevance.


REPORTS TO: VP LATAM and VP MKT (US-based)
LOCATION: Mexico City, Mexico
MODALITY: In Person (travel availability required)
FUNCTIONAL LINK: Corporate Marketing (U.S.) – brand alignment, global guidelines, approval of regional materials and campaigns


Requirements


Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or related field. Master's degree or specialization in B2B Marketing or Commercial Management desirable.
Minimum 3 years in B2B marketing in technology, energy, infrastructure, or related sectors. Demonstrable experience in brand positioning in LATAM markets. Experience working in matrix structures or reporting to U.S.-based leadership is a plus.
Native Spanish. Advanced English (C1 or higher) – daily communication with corporate team in the U.S. Portuguese desirable.
B2B marketing and complex sales cycles (technical / capital-intensive solutions).
Content strategy and brand positioning on LinkedIn and B2B digital channels.
Lead generation and nurturing (HubSpot, Salesforce, or equivalent).
Event management, trade shows, and webinars in the LATAM region.
Marketing budget management and ROI metrics.
Tools: Adobe Suite / Canva Pro, Google Analytics, CRM and marketing automation platforms.


Job Responsibilities & Authority

Brand Strategy & Positioning


Develop and execute the annual marketing plan for LATAM, aligned with the VP's commercial objectives and U.S. corporate guidelines.
Build ON.energy's positioning as a reference in UPS solutions for AI infrastructure in the region.
Adapt corporate messages and materials to the cultural and regulatory context of each LATAM market.


Demand Generation & Lead Management


Design and run digital campaigns (LinkedIn Ads, email marketing, SEO/SEM) targeting decision-makers in datacenter, infrastructure, and IT.
Manage ON.energy's presence at trade shows, conferences, and industry events (Data Center Dynamics, Datacenter Forum LATAM, etc.).
Coordinate with the sales team on lead generation, qualification, and follow-up through CRM.


Content & Communications


Produce and manage technical-commercial content: case studies, whitepapers, product sheets, videos, and webinars on UPS for AI.
Manage ON.energy's digital channels in LATAM: LinkedIn, regional website, and sales materials.
Coordinate with local agencies in design, public relations, and specialized media.


Internal Coordination & Reporting


Report weekly to the VP for LATAM on campaign progress, performance metrics (KPIs), and ROI of activities.
Act as the formal liaison between LATAM and Corporate Marketing (U.S.): align campaign calendars, request and adapt global assets, submit regional materials for approval, and ensure compliance with corporate brand guidelines.
Participate in periodic global marketing team meetings, representing the needs and particularities of the LATAM market.
Manage the LATAM marketing budget efficiently and transparently.
Identify strategic partnerships with industry associations, integrators, and distribution channels in the region.


For US-based Roles - What You’ll Get


Competitive salary + annual performance-based bonus eligibility
Medical, dental, and vision insurance
401(k) with company match
Paid time off and company holidays 


For Mexico-based Roles - What You’ll Get


Competitive salary + annual performance bonus eligibility
Christmas Bonus (Aguinaldo): 30 days
Major medical expenses and life insurance
Paid time off and holidays (per local policy)


For All Roles


Professional development and growth opportunities
Opportunity to grow with a mission-driven team shaping the future of clean energy
Equal Opportunity: ON.energy is committed to equal employment opportunity and to maintaining a work environment free of harassment, discrimination, or retaliation.
Accommodations: If you need an accommodation during the application process, email recruitment@onenergystorage.com
Benefits vary by role and location and are subject to change.

title: Senior Executive Social, GOC
skills: Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.
Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia).
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines.
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines.
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting.
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams.
Bachelor’s degree.
Advanced English level (B2–C2).
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc.
Advanced Excel skills.
description:
About the job

About WPP Media

WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. 

WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

For more information, visit wppmedia.com.

Senior Executive Social, GOC

About WPP Media

WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.

WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com

At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP & WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:


Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity. 
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust. 
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise. 


Role Summary And Impact

As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for a Senior Executive Social who will:


Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia). 
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines. 
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines. 
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting. 
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams. 


Skills And Experience

If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:


Bachelor’s degree. 
Advanced English level (B2–C2). 
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc. 
Advanced Excel skills. 


Life At WPP Media & Benefits

Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include access to internal learning platforms, certifications, and training sessions, life insurance, wellness programs, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, employee mental health awareness day, and more. 

WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

For Mexico:

This position is available in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality. The candidate must perform their work from any location within Mexico. Only Mexican nationals residing in the country or foreign nationals with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work from abroad is not permitted under any circumstances.

For Colombia:

This position is in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality and must be performed within Colombian territory. Only candidates residing in Colombia with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work contracts do not allow employment or relocation abroad.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy ) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted. 

Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: Social Content Analyst
skills: Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. Identificar de manera oportuna videos, formatos y temas virales en tendencia, traduciendo estos hallazgos en propuestas creativas e ideas accionables que permitan a la marca sumarse a la conversación digital de forma relevante y natural.

Contribuir al orden y la fluidez del flujo de trabajo diario y calendarios de publicación. El analista dará seguimiento a los tiempos de entrega entre los equipos de contenido, la agencia y los clientes internos para asegurar que los materiales estén listos en las fechas establecidas.

Enlace operativo para el equipo de Content Strategy, brindando asistencia directa en el armado de presentaciones, propuestas creativas y reportes. Tambien se encargará de documentar los acuerdos y minutas durante las sesiones de lluvia de ideas, dando un seguimiento puntual a las tareas para facilitar la comunicación interna y asegurar que la estrategia se traduzca de manera efectiva en la ejecución.

Extraer y recopilar las métricas de rendimiento de las piezas publicadas en los diferentes canales digitales. Validar que todo el contenido se haya implementado en tiempo y forma. Identificar formatos o publicaciones que hayan tenido un éxito sobresaliente para desarrollas mejores prácticas que sirvan como referencia y replicar en futuras producciones.
Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Ciencias de la Comunicación, Diseño Gráfico o afines.
Familiarización con plataformas sociales (Meta, X, TikTok)
Conceptos básicos de analítica digital y KPIs de redes sociales (Engagement, alcance, impresiones).
Nociones básicas de edición de video móvil o herramientas de diseño rápido (CapCut, Canva).
Creatividad.
Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel).
Nivel de Inglés Avanzado.
Organización y gestión del tiempo.
Proactividad e iniciativa.
Trabajo en equipo y colaboración.
Adaptabilidad y flexibilidad al cambio rápido.
Atención al detalle.
Comunicación asertiva.
Increíble ambiente de trabajo #ElMejorLugarParatrabajar.

Fondo de ahorro y caja de ahorro.
30 días de aguinaldo.

MyIDTravel: Alianza con más de 20 aerolíneas para que puedas volar a un precio preferencial a destinos alrededor del mundo.

Serie de convenios que mejoran tu vida: Gimnasios, tiendas departamentales, restaurantes, universidades y muchas más.

description:
About the job

¡Muchas gracias por tu interés en querer formar parte de nuestra familia #GenteViva!

En Viva nuestro principal propósito es que la gente se divierta, haga negocio y se conecte con sus seres queridos aprovechando la reducción de costo en el transporte aéreo.

¡Estamos seguros que con tu talento, seguiremos volando cada vez más alto!

Como Social Content Analyst serás responsable de contribuir a la fluidez operativa y logística del equipo de Content Marketing, que permita transformar el monitoreo de tendencias y la conversación digital en propuestas creativas que se puedan implementar, mientras se brinda soporte en la coordinación y ejecución de la estrategia de contenido.

Funciones Principales

Monitoreo de Tendencias y Creatividad


Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. Identificar de manera oportuna videos, formatos y temas virales en tendencia, traduciendo estos hallazgos en propuestas creativas e ideas accionables que permitan a la marca sumarse a la conversación digital de forma relevante y natural.


Soporte Logístico y Operativo


Contribuir al orden y la fluidez del flujo de trabajo diario y calendarios de publicación. El analista dará seguimiento a los tiempos de entrega entre los equipos de contenido, la agencia y los clientes internos para asegurar que los materiales estén listos en las fechas establecidas.


Apoyo a la Estrategia y Coordinación


Enlace operativo para el equipo de Content Strategy, brindando asistencia directa en el armado de presentaciones, propuestas creativas y reportes. Tambien se encargará de documentar los acuerdos y minutas durante las sesiones de lluvia de ideas, dando un seguimiento puntual a las tareas para facilitar la comunicación interna y asegurar que la estrategia se traduzca de manera efectiva en la ejecución.


Análisis de Contenido


Extraer y recopilar las métricas de rendimiento de las piezas publicadas en los diferentes canales digitales. Validar que todo el contenido se haya implementado en tiempo y forma. Identificar formatos o publicaciones que hayan tenido un éxito sobresaliente para desarrollas mejores prácticas que sirvan como referencia y replicar en futuras producciones.


Habilidades y Conocimientos Técnicos


Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Ciencias de la Comunicación, Diseño Gráfico o afines.
Familiarización con plataformas sociales (Meta, X, TikTok)
Conceptos básicos de analítica digital y KPIs de redes sociales (Engagement, alcance, impresiones).
Nociones básicas de edición de video móvil o herramientas de diseño rápido (CapCut, Canva).
Creatividad.
Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel).
Nivel de Inglés Avanzado.

Proactividad e iniciativa.
Trabajo en equipo y colaboración.
Adaptabilidad y flexibilidad al cambio rápido.

Comunicación asertiva.

description:
About the job

🚀 Marketing & Communications Assistant




📍 Location: On-site (remote possibility after training)

🕒 Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 5 PM (EST)

💼 Type: Full-time

🌐 Language: English B2–C1




🌟 About the Role

We are looking for a Marketing & Communications Assistant to support the execution of marketing initiatives and help maintain our digital presence.

This is a hands-on, entry-to-mid level role, ideal for someone organized, detail-oriented, and eager to grow within a marketing team.

You will work closely with the team to ensure campaigns, content, and communications are delivered effectively and on time.




🎯 Key Responsibilities

📱 Content & Social Media

Assist in creating and scheduling content across platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook)
Support the development of monthly content calendars
Monitor comments/messages and escalate when needed




📩 Email & Communications

Assist in the creation and scheduling of newsletters and email campaigns
Support communications with partners, donors, and prospects




🎨 Marketing Support

Update website content (non-technical)
Create simple marketing assets (social posts, flyers, visuals)
Support event promotion and coordination




📊 Campaign Execution

Assist in executing marketing campaigns across email and social media
Help organize and manage marketing assets (images, testimonials, content)




📈 Reporting & Tracking

Track basic performance metrics (engagement, email performance)
Support preparation of monthly reports and summaries




✅ Requirements

1–2 years of experience in marketing, communications, or a similar role
Basic knowledge of social media platforms and email marketing
Familiarity with tools such as Canva, Meta Business Suite, or similar (nice to have)
Strong written and verbal English skills (B2+)
Highly organized with strong attention to detail
Ability to follow direction, manage tasks, and meet deadlines




💡 What We’re Looking For

A proactive and reliable team player
Strong communication and organizational skills
Interest in digital marketing and content
Eagerness to learn and grow within a marketing team




If you're looking to build your career in marketing and gain hands-on experience across campaigns, content, and communications — we’d love to hear from you 🚀

title: Senior Commercial Market Specialist (m/f/d)
skills: Monitor and analyze regional performance, competitor dynamics, and demand patterns for the North America market, turning data into strategic recommendations.
Own fare management for the region: define regional pricing settings, fallback logic, and verify implementation across the network.
Support the design and execution of commercial activities — promotions, marketing campaigns, A/B tests, and sales initiatives — aligned with regional strategy.
Build and maintain a country-specific campaign calendar (email, social media, and other channels).
Develop and manage briefings for Marketing & Sales channels, including budget tracking and bi-weekly syncs.
Identify revenue and customer flow opportunities: social discounts, special products, customer segments, and willingness-to-pay insights.
Stay ahead of market trends: track the competitive landscape, macroeconomic shifts, regulatory changes, and network dynamics across the region.
Contribute to topline forecasts (weekly and monthly updates) and propose data-driven improvements.
Collect North America-specific e-commerce needs, build business cases, and present recommendations to leadership.
Lead or contribute to cross-functional projects, acting as subject matter expert or project manager on specific commercial topics.
Leverage AI tools and automation to streamline processes and improve commercial efficiency.
Bachelor's degree in Economics, Finance, Mathematics, Business, or a related field.
2–4 years of experience in commercial analysis, revenue management, or business development — ideally in transportation, airlines, hospitality, beverages, or a similarly dynamic industry.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to go beyond the numbers: you design solutions, not just reports.
A natural connector who actively seeks input from stakeholders, builds relationships across teams, and is not afraid to knock on doors to get things done.
Strategic thinker who can navigate fast-changing macro environments (cost shifts, demand fluctuations, competitive moves) with adaptability and clarity.
Proactive and ownership-driven: you set your own goals, follow through on commitments, and hold yourself accountable to financial targets and project deliverables.
Curious about markets — you want to understand North America's geography, network, and customer dynamics, not just analyze spreadsheets.
Collaborative and a strong team player, with excellent communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders.
Comfortable with ambiguity and freedom; you do not need constant guidance to deliver results.
Fluent in English (additional languages are a plus).
Interest or experience in AI-powered tools and process automation is a strong advantage.
Travel perks: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family.
Work from (M)Anywhere: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year.
Hybrid work model: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life.
Wellbeing support: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members.
Learning & Development: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills.
Mentoring Program: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career.
description:
About the job

At Flix, we offer a dynamic work environment with competitive pay, strong growth opportunities, and a tech-driven approach to making travel more accessible, sustainable, and affordable

We are looking for a Senior Commercial Market Specialist (m/f/d) to join our North America commercial team. This is not a purely analytical role — we need someone who combines strong analytical thinking with the ability to design and implement solutions, build bridges across stakeholders, and take ownership of results. You will interact directly with senior leadership, including the CEO for North America, and shape the commercial strategy of one of the world's fastest-growing mobility networks.

About The Role


Monitor and analyze regional performance, competitor dynamics, and demand patterns for the North America market, turning data into strategic recommendations.
Own fare management for the region: define regional pricing settings, fallback logic, and verify implementation across the network.
Support the design and execution of commercial activities — promotions, marketing campaigns, A/B tests, and sales initiatives — aligned with regional strategy.
Build and maintain a country-specific campaign calendar (email, social media, and other channels).
Develop and manage briefings for Marketing & Sales channels, including budget tracking and bi-weekly syncs.
Identify revenue and customer flow opportunities: social discounts, special products, customer segments, and willingness-to-pay insights.
Stay ahead of market trends: track the competitive landscape, macroeconomic shifts, regulatory changes, and network dynamics across the region.
Contribute to topline forecasts (weekly and monthly updates) and propose data-driven improvements.
Collect North America-specific e-commerce needs, build business cases, and present recommendations to leadership.
Lead or contribute to cross-functional projects, acting as subject matter expert or project manager on specific commercial topics.
Leverage AI tools and automation to streamline processes and improve commercial efficiency.


About You


Bachelor's degree in Economics, Finance, Mathematics, Business, or a related field.
2–4 years of experience in commercial analysis, revenue management, or business development — ideally in transportation, airlines, hospitality, beverages, or a similarly dynamic industry.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to go beyond the numbers: you design solutions, not just reports.
A natural connector who actively seeks input from stakeholders, builds relationships across teams, and is not afraid to knock on doors to get things done.
Strategic thinker who can navigate fast-changing macro environments (cost shifts, demand fluctuations, competitive moves) with adaptability and clarity.
Proactive and ownership-driven: you set your own goals, follow through on commitments, and hold yourself accountable to financial targets and project deliverables.
Curious about markets — you want to understand North America's geography, network, and customer dynamics, not just analyze spreadsheets.
Collaborative and a strong team player, with excellent communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders.
Comfortable with ambiguity and freedom; you do not need constant guidance to deliver results.
Fluent in English (additional languages are a plus).
Interest or experience in AI-powered tools and process automation is a strong advantage.


We recognize that everyone carries a unique set of valuable skills and experiences. If you think you could have an impact even though you don't meet 100% of the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. We want to hear from you! 

What We Offer


Travel perks: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family. 
Work from (M)Anywhere: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year. 
Hybrid work model: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life. 
Wellbeing support: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members. 
Learning & Development: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills. 
Mentoring Program: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career. 


To view more local benefits specific to each office location, please check out this link: Locations - Flix Career

Why Join Flix?

At Flix, you’ll find teams that rally together to overcome challenges and spark creativity. We believe in ownership culture - giving you the freedom to take initiative, make an impact, and shape your own career path.

As we continue to expand across the globe, you can make a real difference in how we work.

If you’re ready to grow and lead your journey, Flix is the place for you!

description:
About the job

🚀 ¡Buscamos Marketing Coordinator LATAM! 🌎







Empresa multinacional líder en desarrollo organizacional y liderazgo se encuentra en búsqueda de un/a Marketing Coordinator LATAM para integrarse a un equipo regional y contribuir al crecimiento de la marca en Latinoamérica. Buscamos una persona proactiva, analítica y orientada a resultados, con experiencia en marketing digital, automatización y generación de demanda, capaz de coordinar iniciativas que impulsen el crecimiento y engagement de nuestra comunidad regional







🎯 Principales responsabilidad

AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing
Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent

Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded

description:
About the job

Hi there! We are South and our client is looking for a Content & SEO Specialist!

Note To Applicants


Eligibility: This position is open to candidates residing in Latin America. 
Application Language: Please submit your CV in English. Applications submitted in other languages will not be considered. 
Professional Presentation: We encourage you to showcase your professional experience by including a Loom video in the application form. While this is optional, candidates who provide a video presentation will be given priority. 
Interview Policy: The use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools during interviews are strictly prohibited. 
Note: As part of the final stages of our hiring process, candidates may be asked to provide professional references for a reference check. If hired, you may also be asked to update your LinkedIn profile :)


The Core Job (Non-Negotiable)

These Four Areas Define Success In This Role


 AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing


You will execute a structured content strategy that includes keyword research, content briefs, and a hub-and-spoke architecture already in place.

Your responsibility is to turn briefs into high-quality, published content.


Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent
Fact-check, improve clarity, and ensure editorial quality (no “AI-sounding” content)
Publish 2–4 blog posts per week into a CMS (proper formatting: H1/H2/H3, meta title, meta description, slug)
Source and integrate relevant visuals for every post (hero images, diagrams, screenshots where relevant)
Ensure images are contextually relevant, correctly sized, and include alt text
Add internal links following the hub-and-spoke structure
Implement FAQ schema markup where applicable (training provided)
Maintain tracking in the content calendar (status, publish date, URL, performance notes)
 Weekly Newsletter


Own a weekly email newsletter sent to a B2B audience (sales and revenue professionals).


Draft one newsletter per week in an email platform (e.g., Klaviyo or equivalent)
Curate 2–3 external insights (industry news, posts, tools, studies)
Write concise commentary and framing around each item
Include links to newly published content
Maintain a clear, non-promotional tone focused on value and relevance
Schedule, test, and send each issue
Monitor open and click-through rates weekly and flag performance trends
 LinkedIn Content (1–2 Posts Weekly)


Manage consistent organic presence on LinkedIn.


Write 1–2 posts per week for a company LinkedIn page
Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded
Pull insights from blog content, product use cases, customer conversations, or sales insights
Create or source supporting visuals (screenshots, simple graphics, text-based visuals)
Schedule posts using a social scheduling tool or native platform
Monitor engagement and flag important comments or mentions for response
 Template Pages & Gated Content


Build and publish downloadable, conversion-focused content assets.


Write landing page copy for template downloads (based on provided briefs)
Format templates into usable assets (PDF, Slides, or Docs)
Publish gated landing pages in CMS with email capture integration
Ensure proper metadata, internal linking, and conversion flow
Maintain consistency between page copy and downloadable asset


Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who is highly proficient in AI-assisted content production and can maintain quality at volume.

Required Skills


Strong experience using AI writing tools effectively (knows the difference between edited output and raw AI content)
Ability to write clearly, directly, and without corporate or filler language
Experience publishing content in a CMS environment
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage workload independently
Ability to source relevant, context-aware visuals
Comfortable receiving editorial feedback and iterating quickly


Strong Plus


Experience with CMS platforms (e.g., Webflow or similar)
Email marketing experience
Basic SEO understanding (metadata, structure, internal linking)
Experience writing for B2B audiences (sales, revenue, or SaaS context)
Familiarity with CRM ecosystems
Experience with LinkedIn content creation and distribution


Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET

Compensation: USD salary

Location: 100% remote opportunity

If this opportunity sounds good to you, send us your resume!

title: Community Manager
description:
About the job

Job Title: Community Manager




Job Type: Full-time




Location: Remote - Latin America




Job Summary:




Join our team as a dynamic Community Manager and play a pivotal role in creating a positive, collaborative, and engaged online environment. You will be at the forefront of customer support and community moderation, proactively resolving issues, answering questions, and ensuring a welcoming experience for all members. If you thrive in fast-paced remote settings and are eager to make a meaningful impact every day, this role is for you.




Key Responsibilities:




• Monitor and moderate online communities to ensure a safe, respectful, and inclusive atmosphere.

• Address customer complaints and questions promptly with empathy and professionalism.

• De-escalate conflicts and diffuse tense situations to maintain group harmony.

• Develop proactive engagement strategies to foster a vibrant and active community.

• Collaborate with internal teams to relay feedback and insights from the community.

• Manage time efficiently to handle multiple conversations and tasks in a remote environment.

• Create clear, friendly, and effective written and verbal communications across channels.




Required Skills and Qualifications:




• Proven experience in customer support and online community moderation.

• Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; a genuine care for clear and empathetic messaging.

• Strong conflict management and de-escalation abilities.

• Self-starter attitude with high energy and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

• Excellent time management skills in a remote work setting.

• Keen attention to detail and ability to multitask under pressure.

• Adaptable, with a willingness to go the extra mile to support community needs.




Preferred Qualifications:




• Background in managing large-scale online communities.

• Experience with various community platforms and CRM tools.

• Passion for building lasting relationships and driving positive user experiences.

You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma
