description:
About the job

SEO/AEO Analyst with strong technical experience (WordPress)




Do you get excited when your site shows up in position 1?




Are you comfortable with WordPress?




This is a WordPress Developer/SEO hybrid position.




We are looking for a very detailed focus person who can optimize our sites for organic conversions.




You'll work with diverse clients and help keep the sites optimized.




And with a great team (C1 level English required)




If that sounds like you, read on.




The Role:




Build pages in accordance with SEO best practices (metadata, headers, alt text, interlinking, etc.) - we will provide targeted SEO copy.

Technical SEO creation and implementation with focus on schema and robots (bonus if you have AEO knowledge).

QA all elements and ensure mobile-first layouts and indexation.

Identify broken links, misconfigured tags, crawl inefficiencies, etc.




This Is for You If...




-> You're detail-obsessed: spot a missing alt text or a broken schema before anyone else even notices.




-> You're ownership-driven: if we give you a content map and a copy doc, and you'll run with it. No hand-holding needed.




-> You're craving a team environment: you like to work with fun people and are open to lending a hand when needed




Skills & Experience




Must-Haves:




+2 years of hands-on experience with WordPress and front-end development.
Strong HTML/CSS—you write clean, semantic markup.
On-page SEO: titles, meta, headings, alt text, and internal linking.
JSON-LD schema experience using Schema.org and the Rich Results Test.
Solid understanding of crawlability, indexability, canonicalization, and core web vitals.
Excellent English skills (C2 level).




Nice-to-Haves:




Experience with Webflow, Wix, Shopify, or straight HTML sites.
Familiarity with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Search Console workflows.
Some knowledge of local SEO and Google Business Profile workflows.
Comfortable with a bit of JavaScript for things like FAQ accordions and basic UI tweaks.




What We Offer




Schedule: Remote, Monday–Friday, 9am to 5pm EST.

Compensation: $3,000 to $3,500 per month

Team: Working directly inside a multi-disciplinary SEO/AEO team







About Us:




GreenBanana SEO is at the edge of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), helping brands get noticed in AI-driven search.




We're a fun, hard-working team that keeps things simple, communicates clearly, and delivers results.




If you crave working in a supportive team environment and growing in your AEO knowledge, this role will fill your cup.




Only resumes in English will be taken into consideration.




In the form, please respond "blueprint" to the "Why should we consider YOU for this position?" question.




Important Note: This is a contractor position, not an employee role.

title: Community Manager + Data Specialist
description:

This job is sourced from a job board. Learn More

Aplica enviando tu CV / Portafolio de optimización a ****** con el asunto: CM + Data Specialist .

title: Email Marketing Operations Specialist
skills: Competitive salary in USD
Remote-first flexibility. Work from anywhere
PTO and paid U.S. holidays

Build and format emails and SMS campaigns inside Klaviyo using provided creative assets, copy, and brand guidelines, and configure and deploy automated flows with triggers, splits, filters, delays, and conditional logic.

QA all campaigns and flows for accuracy before deployment, testing mobile and desktop rendering across devices and inboxes, and ensuring links, tracking, personalization, and dynamic content function properly.
Configure dynamic content blocks, product feeds, and personalized content, while building, maintaining, and troubleshooting audience segments and lists.
Schedule and deploy campaigns and flows accurately and on time, implementing hide/show logic and conditional content within emails as needed.
Collaborate closely with Lifecycle Marketing Strategists and Specialists to execute campaigns and automations across multiple ecommerce client accounts.
Maintain clear organization and documentation across multiple accounts and deliverables.
3+ years of hands-on experience working in Klaviyo, including experience supporting ecommerce and DTC brands.
Experience building both campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo, Attentive, or other ESPs, including SMS marketing execution.

Deep understanding of Klaviyo flow logic and automation structure, including conditional splits, trigger filters, dynamic product feeds, segmentation, hide/show logic, and dynamic variables and personalization.
Strong knowledge of email rendering best practices and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues independently.
Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email and experience with Shopify integrations are strong pluses.
Strong English communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously in a fast-paced agency environment.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring a Paid Search & Social Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning agency specializing in the automotive vertical, recognized as Best Large SEO Agency and winner of Best Low Budget PPC Campaign at the 2024 US Search Awards. This is a learning-forward role for someone curious, resourceful, and ready to run real campaigns that push what is possible.




🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.




✅ What You'll Need:




1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.
Working knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Data Studio, Google Ads Editor, Google Tag Manager, and Google Merchant Center.
Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 Direct mentorship from top paid media specialists — real room to grow and own your campaigns inside a fast-moving agency.
🏆 A high-performance, collaborative culture where testing, learning, and pushing boundaries are part of daily life.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client where curiosity is rewarded and your growth is taken seriously from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to run real campaigns, learn from the best, and grow inside one of the most innovative digital marketing agencies in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to tell us about campaigns you have run and results you have driven. We can't wait to meet you!

Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.

¿Cuál será tu reto?

Serás responsable de desarrollar y coordinar la ejecución de activaciones comerciales para distintas marcas y canales, asegurando una implementación efectiva de estrategias de trade marketing que impulsen la demanda, la visibilidad de producto y el cumplimiento de objetivos comerciales.

Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

Conocimiento en:

Desarrollo de materiales POP

Trabajo multifuncional con áreas comerciales y de marketing

description:
About the job

Shopify Developer & Web Growth Engineer

Remote | LATAM or Philippines

Part-Time | 30 Hours per Week

$15-$20 USD per Hour




About the Opportunity

Our client is a rapidly growing U.S.-based telehealth and wellness company seeking a Shopify Developer & Web Growth Engineer to take ownership of its ecommerce infrastructure, conversion optimization initiatives, and growth engineering projects.

This is not a traditional Shopify maintenance role. We are looking for someone who combines strong Shopify development expertise with a conversion-focused mindset and the ability to build scalable systems that directly impact revenue growth.

The ideal candidate is highly technical, comfortable working with APIs and automation, and enjoys solving business problems through technology, experimentation, and process improvement.




What You'll Do

Shopify Development & Conversion Optimization

Own and maintain the company's primary Shopify storefront
Build and optimize quiz funnels, upsells, bundles, pop-ups, and conversion-focused experiences
Develop landing pages with dynamic content and embedded business logic
Implement educational and interactive customer journeys
Improve average order value (AOV), retention, and subscription performance
Support lifecycle marketing initiatives through tracking, segmentation, and automation

CRM, Integrations & Automation

Integrate Shopify with GoHighLevel CRM and related marketing systems
Manage and optimize integrations with Klaviyo, subscription platforms, referral tools, and review platforms
Customize applications using APIs, webhooks, Shopify Functions, and automation tools
Build and maintain Shopify Flows and backend automation systems
Ensure reliable data flow across the company's technology ecosystem

Systems Development & Growth Engineering

Develop lightweight customer-facing portals for subscriptions, order management, and customer information
Build integrations between CRM, ecommerce, and healthcare-related systems
Support the development of a WordPress/WooCommerce sister brand
Maintain seamless tracking, reporting, and data synchronization across platforms
Create internal tools, dashboards, and automation systems that improve operational efficiency




Required Qualifications

Strong hands-on Shopify development experience
Experience building conversion-focused funnels, quizzes, landing pages, and ecommerce experiences
Experience with Klaviyo, GoHighLevel, and lifecycle marketing platforms
Proficiency working with APIs, webhooks, Shopify Functions, and automation tools
Experience with subscription management platforms such as Skio or similar solutions
Strong understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO)
Ability to work independently in a fast-paced startup environment
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
Strong problem-solving and systems-thinking mindset
Daily use of AI tools to improve productivity and automate workflows




Preferred Qualifications

Experience with WordPress and WooCommerce
Healthcare, telehealth, pharmacy, or patient portal experience
CRM integration experience within ecommerce environments
Experience with analytics, experimentation, and performance monitoring tools
Experience building internal tools, dashboards, or customer management systems




What Success Looks Like

Improved conversion rates and customer acquisition performance
Increased average order value and customer retention
Scalable integrations and automation systems
Efficient cross-platform data flow and reporting
Faster deployment of growth initiatives and experiments

description:
About the job

✨ IMPORTANT ✨

WATCH THIS QUICK LOOM VIDEO ON HOW TO GET HIRED:

https://www.loom.com/share/345f776084e642ba99c24aabe40a67a0

C1 ENGLISH LEVEL IS REQUIRED. THE SELECTED CANDIDATE WILL BE SPEAKING STRICTLY IN ENGLISH DURING THEIR ENTIRE SHIFT.

PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND AUDIO RECORDING IN ENGLISH




Advanced Agent Marketing Client Success Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: TIMDEE2

🏢 Industry: Financial and Advisory Services

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: The Client Success Support Specialist must be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours, especially during the hours when clients are actively taking apps, attending appointments, and submitting support requests. (9:00am to 5:00pm EST)

💰 Salary: This role pays approximately $10/hour, depending on experience and fit.

🚀 Target Start Date: asap




ROLE OVERVIEW




We are looking for a Client Success Support Specialist to support our Customer Success Managers with client communication, technical questions, CRM updates, app/order tracking, refund and credit-back requests, and basic conflict resolution.

This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, strong in written English, and comfortable helping clients work through process or technology-related questions. The right person will be able to communicate clearly, keep accurate records, follow up consistently, and make good decisions without needing step-by-step direction for every situation.




Key Responsibilities




The Client Success Support Specialist will assist the Customer Success team by answering client tech questions, helping clients understand apps and internal processes, and making sure client information is accurately updated in the CRM. This person will help monitor client availability, check integrations, track app/order status, and make sure clients understand how many apps they have remaining in their order.

This role will also help quality-check disposition calls, confirm that clients are following the correct appointment process, and make sure clients complete required Google Sheets or tracking forms after calls. The specialist will communicate with internal team members about apps that have been requested for credit-back, refund review, or additional follow-up.

In addition, this person will support offboarding, document client concerns, and help de-escalate frustrated clients in a professional manner. Common client situations may include refund requests, app credit-back requests, clients saying they were not looking for an annuity, did not want a specific state, had a poor call experience, did not want to join Zoom, or are already working with another advisor.




Core Responsibilities




Client Support

Answer client questions, provide written support, and help resolve basic client issues.

Technical Assistance

Help clients with app-related questions, tool access, integrations, and process confusion.

CRM Updates

Update client records, track availability, document issues, and maintain clean client data.

App & Order Tracking

Make sure clients receive apps on time and understand how many apps remain in their order.

Credit-Back & Refund Support

Track requests, communicate status internally, and gather context needed for review.

Process Follow-Up

Ensure clients follow the appointment process and complete required Google Sheets after calls.

Conflict Resolution

Help diffuse client frustration and escalate issues appropriately when needed.

Offboarding Support

Assist with client offboarding, documentation, and final communication steps.

Required Skills and Experience

The ideal candidate must be comfortable working across multiple systems and communicating quickly with both clients and internal team members. Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL and Slack is required. Strong written English is also important because this role involves client communication, internal updates, and accurate documentation.

We are not looking for someone who is simply “point and shoot.” This person needs to understand the situation, use good judgment, and decide when to resolve an issue directly versus when to escalate it to a Customer Success Manager or backend closer.

description:
About the job

★ PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR CV IN ENGLISH ★

Online Engagement Specialist

Location: Remote — LATAM

Employment Type: Full-Time (Independent Contractor)

Industry: Travel & Hospitality

Compensation: $1,720 – $1,820 USD/month

Schedule: 40 hours/week | Eastern Time (EDT)

Working Hours


Monday – Wednesday: 4:00 PM – 11:00 PM (or 12:00 AM EDT) 
Saturday – Sunday: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM (or 9:00 PM EDT) 


About The Role

We are seeking a highly engaging, customer-focused, and proactive Online Engagement Specialist to become the first point of contact for visitors exploring one of the leading destination wedding travel platforms in North America.

This role combines real-time customer interaction with live chat technology to engage prospective clients, answer questions, qualify leads, and guide visitors toward scheduling a consultation with a Destination Wedding Specialist.

More than simply responding to chats, you'll play a critical role in generating qualified leads, creating exceptional customer experiences, and helping couples take the first step toward planning one of the most memorable events of their lives.

The ideal candidate is an outstanding communicator with exceptional written English, thrives in fast-paced environments, enjoys multitasking, and knows how to build meaningful customer interactions that convert interest into scheduled consultations.

This is a new position within the organization, offering the opportunity to help shape best practices, contribute ideas, and make a meaningful impact as the team continues to grow.

What You'll Do

Live Chat & Customer Engagement


Serve as the first point of contact for website visitors through live chat. 
Engage prospective clients in real time using a friendly and consultative approach. 
Respond to customer questions about destination weddings, travel services, and the planning process. 
Personalize conversations to deliver an exceptional customer experience. 
Build rapport with visitors and encourage continued engagement. 


Lead Qualification & Appointment Scheduling


Engage with prospective clients to understand their travel and wedding planning needs. 
Collect and update customer information accurately within the CRM. 
Qualify leads and connect them with the appropriate Destination Wedding Specialist. 
Schedule consultations and ensure clients receive all necessary follow-up communications. 
Support a seamless transition from initial inquiry to specialist consultation. 


Customer Experience & Performance


Manage multiple live chat conversations simultaneously while maintaining exceptional response times and service quality. 
Support engagement and lead conversion through personalized interactions. 
Contribute to improving chat messaging, workflows, and customer experience. 
Collaborate with internal teams to continuously optimize performance and conversion rates. 


Collaboration & Continuous Improvement


Work closely with Marketing and Sales teams to improve customer engagement strategies. 
Share customer insights and feedback to enhance chat performance. 
Help identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency and lead generation. 


Required Qualifications

What We're Looking For


C1 English proficiency or higher (written and spoken) is REQUIRED. 
Outstanding written communication skills with excellent grammar and spelling. 
Minimum 2 years of experience in:
Live Chat Support 
Customer Support 
Customer Success 
Online Sales Support 
Lead Qualification 
Experience interacting with customers through live chat, messaging platforms, or CRM systems. 
Typing speed of 60+ WPM. 
Ability to confidently manage multiple customer conversations simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 
Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn new platforms and digital tools. 
Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail. 
Ability to work independently in a fully remote environment. 


Preferred Qualifications


Experience within:
Travel 
Hospitality 
Tourism 
Wedding Industry 
Experience using live chat software and CRM platforms. 
Experience scheduling appointments for sales teams. 
Previous experience supporting U.S.-based customers. 


What Success Looks Like

Success in this role will be measured by your ability to:


Increase qualified lead generation. 
Improve consultation booking rates. 
Deliver an exceptional customer experience through live chat. 
Successfully manage multiple concurrent conversations while maintaining quality and responsiveness. 
Increase visitor engagement and conversion. 
Help drive the growth of confirmed destination wedding events. 


Why Join Us?


Competitive compensation in USD. 
10 paid days off annually (prorated during the first year). 
Fully remote contractor opportunity. 
Join a collaborative and growing team. 
Opportunity to make a direct impact in a newly created position. 
Long-term career growth within the travel and hospitality industry. 
Dynamic, technology-driven environment focused on delivering exceptional customer experiences. 


Important Notes

Applications may not be considered if candidates:


Do not meet the C1 English requirement. 
Do not demonstrate excellent written English skills. 
Have typing speeds below 60 WPM. 
Lack experience managing multiple live customer conversations simultaneously. 
Are unavailable to work the required Eastern Time (EDT) schedule. 


This is a remote/telecommute position.

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

About the job

I’m helping Equity Medical find a top candidate to join their team full-time for the role of Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist.




You'll expand access to clinical trials by engaging diverse communities and advancing medical research.




Compensation:

USD 18K - 22K/year




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Equity Medical:

"Advance clinical research by providing patient-centered trials and expanding access to innovative treatments across diverse communities."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Scheduling, Retention management, Documentation.
You have the potential to develop in Clinical research, CRM tools.
Spanish - Fully fluent
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

About Equity Medical

Equity Medical is a rapidly growing clinical research organization dedicated to expanding access to clinical trials in underserved communities. We are seeking a bilingual Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist to support participant recruitment and enrollment efforts across multiple clinical research sites.




Position Overview

The Patient Recruiter & Retention Specialist will be responsible for engaging prospective study participants, conducting pre-screening activities, supporting enrollment efforts, and maintaining ongoing communication to improve study participation and retention.

This is a remote independent contractor position supporting U.S.-based clinical research operations.




Key Responsibilities

Contact and pre-screen warm digital leads through the CRM to assess preliminary study eligibility.

Follow up consistently with prospective participants to reduce no-shows and increase enrollment conversion rates.

Schedule and coordinate participant appointments as needed.

Maintain accurate and timely documentation within the CRM and related systems.

Collaborate closely with marketing, recruitment, and clinical operations teams to achieve study enrollment goals.

Attend weekly meetings with on-site clinical teams.

Attend weekly meetings with the marketing and recruitment departments.

Conduct outreach to potential participants within the community in a professional, ethical, and compliant manner.

Communicate effectively with both English-speaking and Spanish-speaking participants.

Assist with retention initiatives to improve participant engagement and study completion.

Perform additional administrative and recruitment-related duties as assigned.




Qualifications

Fluent in both English and Spanish (written and verbal) – required.

Experience in patient recruitment, customer service, sales, call center operations, healthcare, clinical research, or a related field preferred.

Strong phone presence and interpersonal skills.

Comfortable making a high volume of outbound and follow-up calls.

Ability to build rapport and communicate effectively with diverse populations.

Strong organizational and time management skills.

Experience using CRM systems is preferred.

Clinical research experience is a plus but not required.

Schedule Requirements

Required schedule: Saturday through Wednesday.

Working hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM Pacific Time (San Diego, California).

Must be available to attend scheduled team meetings and collaborate with U.S.-based teams during business hours.

Must maintain reliable internet connectivity and a professional remote work environment.

Preferred Experience

Clinical research recruitment.

Patient engagement and retention.

Healthcare scheduling or patient coordination.

CRM platforms and lead management.

Experience supporting U.S.-based organizations.




Independent Contractor Status

This position is offered as an independent contractor engagement. Contractors are responsible for their own taxes, insurance, equipment, and compliance with applicable laws in their country of residence.




Your potential leader(s):

Grace Ulerio -



Desired Skills and Experience

Scheduling, Retention management, Documentation, Clinical research, CRM tools

description:
About the job

Role: Spanish Blogger (Work From Home)
Job Type: Part-Time Contract
Location: Remote (Work From Home)
Compensation: Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly




About the Role

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.




What You'll Do

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency
Write short prompts and creative responses to help train AI systems
Rank and compare AI outputs based on clear evaluation criteria
Provide written feedback on language quality




What We're Looking For

Fluency in your language and English
Bachelor's degree or higher, preferably in a humanities, language, or writing-related field
Professional experience working with language - writing, teaching, translating, editing, annotating, or related fields
Strong attention to detail and ability to follow evaluation guidelines
Background in linguistics, academic writing, data annotation, or AI content evaluation is a plus




What You Get

Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly
Fully remote - work from anywhere
Flexible hours - you set your own schedule
Part-time contract - ideal as a primary or supplemental income source

description:
About the job

¡Únete a Sigma! Creemos en cuidar verdaderamente a nuestros colaboradores para asegurar que se sientan capacitados para ser su mejor versión en el trabajo. Este es el comienzo de una carrera con una compañía innovadora de rápido crecimiento.




OU: México | Site: Torre Sigma MTY

Ubicación: Calle Arq. Pedro Ramírez Vázquez #200 Int. #13, Valle Oriente, C.P. 66269, San Pedro Garza García, N.L.

Modalidad: Híbrido




Objetivo del Puesto: Brindar apoyo a las jefaturas de Trade Marketing en la planeación, ejecución y seguimiento de concursos y dinámicas comerciales dirigidas a clientes y fuerza de ventas, asegurando su correcta implementación y contribuyendo al logro de los objetivos comerciales




Actividades Principales:

Dar seguimiento y ejecutar concursos y dinámicas comerciales, asegurando su correcta implementación y cierre.
Evaluar la factibilidad de iniciativas y monitorear resultados mediante seguimiento semanal.
Administrar y mantener actualizada la plataforma de programas y concursos (Cliente Excelente).
Elaborar presentaciones ejecutivas con enfoque visual y alineadas a marca (PowerPoint, Canva, etc.).
Dar seguimiento a la entrega de premios y gestionar incidencias con proveedores.
Apoyar en la estructuración de mecánicas y medición de concursos, incluyendo análisis de ROI.
Proponer mejoras al programa de recompensas y campañas actuales a partir del análisis y contacto con clientes.




Requisitos:

Estudiante Activo de carreras como Mercadotecnia, Administración, Negocios, Comunicación, Ingeniería Industrial o afín.
Fecha de Graduación: Julio 2027 o posterior.
MS Excel Intermedio (bases de datos, tablas dinámicas).
Conceptos básicos financieros (ROI, punto de equilibrio).
Deseable conocimiento en retail o consumo masivo.
PowerPoint avanzado.
Canva o herramientas de diseño.
Capacidad analítica, Responsabilidad, Liderazgo, Proactividad, Pensamiento Lógico, Orientación a metas.
Habilidades de Comunicación, y de Organización / Estructura.




En Sigma, todos los procesos de reclutamiento y selección son completamente gratuitos, por lo que no cobramos por realizar exámenes médicos, entrevistas, aplicación de psicometrías o cualquier otra etapa del proceso de selección. En Sigma promovemos la originalidad. Reconocemos y celebramos el valor único de las personas, fomentando la igualdad de oportunidades sin discriminar por afiliación política, cultura, edad, embarazo, estado civil, género, nacionalidad, nivel socioeconómico, maternidad, paternidad, religión, orientación sexual, origen étnico o tipo de discapacidad. Sigma prohíbe la solicitud y el uso de certificados médicos de no embarazo y Virus de Inmunodeficiencia Humana (VIH) como requisitos para el ingreso, permanencia o ascenso en el empleo.




¡Únete a nuestra comunidad de más de 60 nacionalidades en 4 continentes!

title: Community Manager + Data Specialist
description:
About the job
This job is sourced from a job board. Learn More

¿Eres de los que ve oportunidades de negocio donde otros solo ven publicaciones?

¿Te apasiona el engagement pero te obsesiona el ROI?

En nuestro equipo no buscamos a un perfil tradicional.

Estamos en la búsqueda de un/a Community Manager & Data Specialist que quiera llevar las estrategias digitales al siguiente nivel, fusionando la sensibilidad del contenido con el poder de la analítica y la Inteligencia Artificial.Si tienes un perfil híbrido que domina la conversación digital pero se mueve como pez en el agua entre métricas y optimizaciones, ¡este lugar es para ti!

¿Cuál será tu misión?

Estrategia y Optimización: Monitorear, analizar y optimizar campañas publicitarias activas en Meta, TikTok y Google, asegurando el mejor rendimiento del presupuesto.Data Management: Desarrollar e interpretar reportes periódicos de rendimiento, transformando gráficos complejos en accionables estratégicos.Control de KPIs: Dar seguimiento puntual al cumplimiento de objetivos de marca y de conversión de nuestros clientes.

¿Qué buscamos en ti?

Capacidad de análisis y razonamiento lógico: No te quedas en la superficie del "por qué"; te gusta escarbar en ladata para entender el comportamiento de las audiencias.Conocimientos avanzados en plataformas de pauta: Experiencia real operando y optimizando en Meta Business Manager, TikTok Ads Manager y Google Ads.ADN Tecnológico (AI Savvy): Uso y adopción activa de herramientas de Inteligencia Artificial generativa y de automatización para optimizar tus propios flujos de trabajo, agilizar reportes y hacer más eficientes los procesos diarios.Mínimo 3 años de agencia de publicidad, agencia de medios, o division de marketing digital⚡ ¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Un entorno creativo, ágil y en constante evolución tecnológica, donde tu voz y tus experimentos cuentan.Cero burocracia aburrida; aquí premiamos la proactividad, el pensamiento crítico y la eficiencia.Espacio para liderar proyectos con marcas retadoras y dinámicas.Horario de 9 am a 7 pm (2 horas de comida de 2-4pm) hibrido LUNES Y VIERNES en modalidad Home Office, y martes, miércoles y jueves presencialOficina ubicada en la colonia DEL VALLE CENTRO, Delegación Benito JuárezSueldo base de $16,000 a $21,000 mensuales con prestaciones de ley¿Hacemos match?

Si tienes el balance perfecto entre el hemisferio analítico y la chispa digital, ¡queremos conocerte!

Aplica enviando tu CV / Portafolio de optimización a ****** con el asunto: CM + Data Specialist .

title: Procurement Coordinator Marketing Materials
skills: Gestión de compras: Coordinar y negociar la adquisición de materiales comerciales, asegurando el cumplimiento de requerimientos técnicos, presupuestales y de tiempos establecidos.

Optimización de inversión y generación de ahorros: Identificar oportunidades de eficiencia y mejora continua mediante la negociación de precios, optimización de estructuras de costos y mejora de procesos operativos, contribuyendo a la rentabilidad del negocio.

Gestión con proveedores estratégicos: Mantener una comunicación constante y efectiva con proveedores clave, asegurando el cumplimiento de KPIs, niveles de servicio, entregables y políticas de la compañía.

Innovación y mejora continua: Impulsar iniciativas de automatización, digitalización y circularidad dentro del proceso de compra y gestión de materiales, promoviendo prácticas más eficientes y sostenibles.
Seguimiento y control: Dar seguimiento al desempeño de proveedores, contratos, presupuestos y proyectos, elaborando reportes y análisis para la toma de decisiones.

Cumplimiento y sostenibilidad: garantizar que todos los procesos estén alineados con las políticas de Procurement, Compliance y Sustentabilidad de Heineken (compras responsables, diversidad de proveedores, reducción de huella ambiental).
Alineación interna: Colaborar de manera efectiva con áreas como Finanzas, Trade, Marketing, Operaciones y Legal para asegurar una correcta ejecución de los proyectos de inversión.
Educación: Licenciatura en Administración, Negocios, Finanzas, Mercadotecnia o afines.
Deseable Maestría en Administración, Negocios, Finanzas, Mercadotecnia o afines.
Experiencia previa en procurement estratégico o gestión de materiales comerciales.
Experiencia en manejo de proveedores estratégicos y seguimiento de KPIs.
Deseable : Experiencia previa en marketing procurement
Experiencia la compra de materiales y negociación con proveedores estratégicos.
Manejo de procesos de licitación, negociación y contratos.
Participación en planeación y control presupuestal.

title: Senior Content & Social Specialist
skills: Own and drive the Social Media and Content Strategy across the United States, Canada, and Latin America, ensuring strong brand positioning and consistency while translating global narratives into relevant regional storytelling.
Drive the creation and delivery of global employer branding content for both Flipp and Shopfully, developing assets that strengthen our positioning as a global, integrated company across all markets.

Define and execute content plans across all owned channels — including LinkedIn (primary), Instagram, newsletters, and corporate websites — ensuring alignment between regional initiatives and global priorities.

Create and optimize high-impact content (LinkedIn and Instagram posts, videos, ebooks, case studies), working closely with content specialists, designers, and videomakers from concept to publishing and performance analysis.
Shape and amplify executive presence on LinkedIn, elevating leadership visibility, and drive employee advocacy programs, to extend the reach of our content.
Contribute to internal communication initiatives at a global level, managing internal newsletters and the company intranet to deliver clear, consistent messaging.
Own and manage corporate websites (WordPress CMS), overseeing content updates, publishing, and coordination with external agencies.
3+ years of experience in B2B content creation and social media management, with a strong editorial mindset and a sharp eye for tone of voice and brand consistency.
Excellent copywriting skills, with the ability to craft clear, engaging, and strategic messaging for both external and internal audiences.
Ability to connect content strategy to business objectives and translate complex topics and business priorities into high-impact content.
Deep understanding of LinkedIn and Instagram, including formats, algorithms, and performance levers.
Professional-level fluency in spoken and written Spanish & English is required.
An inclusive, collaborative environment where your voice matters
A remote-first environment
The tools and opportunities you need to grow and develop
Every opportunity to own your success
Your authentic self, every day
Your best work, from anywhere
An appetite for learning, curiosity, and a growth mindset
Motivation, initiative and the mind of an entrepreneur
description:
About the job

About Flipp

Flipp partners with the largest North American retailers and brands to deliver local promotions and savings to millions of engaged shoppers daily, driving superior returns on investments.

We help people make smarter shopping decisions with autonomy and accountability. With rising living costs, Flipp's mission is crucial. Our Shopper Consideration Platform allows retailers and manufacturers to create digital experiences from their savings & deals content, aiding shoppers in deciding what to buy and where to buy it. Together, we make a difference.

Our five principles, Progress Over Perfection, Clarity Through Transparency, Learn Loudly, Challenge with Empathy, and Always Build Better, bring a relentless progress mindset to life. They're not just slogans, but they're the behaviours we expect, reward, and hold ourselves accountable to. You'll be equipped to make an impact, realize your potential, and stay inspired every step of the way.

As a Senior Content & Social Specialist, you will own Flipp's B2B storytelling across the Americas, shaping how we show up as a trusted voice in the retail industry. Your focus will be on bringing global narratives to life at the regional level, translating business priorities, research, and market insights into compelling, high-impact content across key markets: the United States, Canada, Mexico, Colombia, and Brazil.

Beyond the regional scope, you will also play a key role globally. You will work closely with the People & Culture team on employer branding content for both Flipp and Shopfully, crafting narratives that strengthen our positioning as a global, integrated company and support talent attraction across markets. Employer branding is embedded in business storytelling, showcasing people, expertise, and impact through credible, narrative-driven content. This work naturally connects with internal communications, where you will strengthen knowledge sharing and engagement across the organization.

What you'll get the opportunity to do:


Own and drive the Social Media and Content Strategy across the United States, Canada, and Latin America, ensuring strong brand positioning and consistency while translating global narratives into relevant regional storytelling.
Drive the creation and delivery of global employer branding content for both Flipp and Shopfully, developing assets that strengthen our positioning as a global, integrated company across all markets.
Define and execute content plans across all owned channels — including LinkedIn (primary), Instagram, newsletters, and corporate websites — ensuring alignment between regional initiatives and global priorities.
Create and optimize high-impact content (LinkedIn and Instagram posts, videos, ebooks, case studies), working closely with content specialists, designers, and videomakers from concept to publishing and performance analysis.
Shape and amplify executive presence on LinkedIn, elevating leadership visibility, and drive employee advocacy programs, to extend the reach of our content.
Contribute to internal communication initiatives at a global level, managing internal newsletters and the company intranet to deliver clear, consistent messaging.
Own and manage corporate websites (WordPress CMS), overseeing content updates, publishing, and coordination with external agencies.


What you'll bring to the team:


3+ years of experience in B2B content creation and social media management, with a strong editorial mindset and a sharp eye for tone of voice and brand consistency.
Excellent copywriting skills, with the ability to craft clear, engaging, and strategic messaging for both external and internal audiences.
Ability to connect content strategy to business objectives and translate complex topics and business priorities into high-impact content.
Deep understanding of LinkedIn and Instagram, including formats, algorithms, and performance levers.
Professional-level fluency in spoken and written Spanish & English is required.


Our promise to each other:

What we bring:

What you bring:


An inclusive, collaborative environment where your voice matters 
A remote-first environment 
The tools and opportunities you need to grow and develop 
Every opportunity to own your success
Your authentic self, every day 
Your best work, from anywhere 
An appetite for learning, curiosity, and a growth mindset 
Motivation, initiative and the mind of an entrepreneur


Here's how to apply:

This position is currently vacant and open for applications. If you're interested in working with us on the future of shopping, fill out the fields below and submit your application. While experience and skill sets are valuable, growth potential and attitudes are equally important. If you're prepared to grow dramatically with your team at a world-class learning organization, consider applying. We understand that the most creative solutions require diversity in thought and life experiences.

Flipp is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, ancestry, religion, creed, sex, national or ethnic origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, family status, disability, or gender identity or expression or any other protected grounds. We are proud to be a welcoming space for employees, of every background, to bring their whole selves to work with confidence. Flipp is committed to providing appropriate accommodations to ensure our selection process is equitable, and such accommodations can be made available on request. If you require an accommodation, please contact your dedicated recruiter directly.

Hiring is a deeply human process; therefore, we use AI in limited, administrative ways to help streamline our hiring process. An AI-powered scheduling tool assists with coordinating interviews, and our applicant tracking system may use AI to identify relevant keywords within applications. We do not use AI to assess your application, make hiring decisions, or conduct interviews. All evaluations are completed by real people.

A member of our recruitment team will respond to you in the coming weeks.

Workflow optimization
Process troubleshooting
Relationship building

Modelo de Trabalho Híbrido: Adotamos um ambiente de trabalho híbrido e flexível (2-3 dias por semana no escritório, dependendo do papel) para funções baseadas em escritório, garantindo uma experiência integrada e coerente tanto no âmbito digital quanto presencial.

Flexibilidade e Equilíbrio entre Trabalho e Vida Pessoal: ""Flex My Way"" consiste em um conjunto de políticas de projetadas para facilitar a gestão das responsabilidades pessoais e profissionais, seja cuidando da família, participando de atividades comunitárias ou dedicando tempo para descanso e renovação pessoal. Essas políticas se baseiam em nossa abordagem flexível de trabalho, permitindo que os funcionários trabalhem de qualquer lugar por até 8 semanas por ano, promovendo assim um equilíbrio ideal entre seus compromissos de trabalho e pessoais.

Desenvolvimento e Crescimento Profissional: Promovemos uma cultura de aprendizado contínuo e desenvolvimento de habilidades, preparando nossos talentos para enfrentar os desafios do futuro e oferecer soluções reais. Nosso programa ""Grow My Way"" e a abordagem focada em habilidades garantem que você tenha as ferramentas e conhecimentos para crescer, liderar e prosperar em um futuro habilitado pela inteligência artificial.

Benefícios Competitivos do Setor: Oferecemos planos de benefícios abrangentes que incluem assistência médica e odontológica, dois dias de feriado corporativo para saúde mental, programas de incentivo por performance e recursos para o bem-estar mental, físico e financeiro.

Cultura: Reconhecida globalmente por inclusão e pertencimento, flexibilidade, equilíbrio entre trabalho e vida pessoal. Vivemos nossos valores: obsessão pelos nossos clientes, competir para ganhar, desafiar o (seu) nosso pensamento, agir rápido e aprender rápido e juntos somos mais fortes.

Impacto Social: Gere um impacto em sua comunidade com nosso Instituto de Impacto Social. Oferecemos a todos colaboradores dois dias de voluntariado pagos anualmente e oportunidades para se envolver em projetos de consultoria pro bono e iniciativas de Meio Ambiente, Sociais e de Governança (ESG).

Fazendo um Impacto Real no Mundo: Somos uma das poucas empresas globalmente que auxilia seus clientes na busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. Trabalhando em conjunto com os profissionais e instituições que servimos, contribuímos para sustentar o estado de direito, fomentar o comércio, detectar infratores, relatar os fatos e oferecer informações confiáveis e imparciais para pessoas em todo o mundo.

Desenvolvimento e Crescimento Profissional: Promovemos uma cultura de aprendizado contínuo e desenvolvimento de habilidades, preparando nossos talentos para enfrentar os desafios do futuro e oferecer soluções reais. Nosso programa ""Grow My Way"" e a abordagem focada em habilidades garantem que você tenha as ferramentas e conhecimentos para crescer, liderar e prosperar em um futuro habilitado pela inteligência artificial. 
Benefícios Competitivos do Setor: Oferecemos planos de benefícios abrangentes que incluem assistência médica e odontológica, dois dias de feriado corporativo para saúde mental, programas de incentivo por performance e recursos para o bem-estar mental, físico e financeiro. 
Cultura: Reconhecida globalmente por inclusão e pertencimento, flexibilidade, equilíbrio entre trabalho e vida pessoal. Vivemos nossos valores: obsessão pelos nossos clientes, competir para ganhar, desafiar o (seu) nosso pensamento, agir rápido e aprender rápido e juntos somos mais fortes. 
Impacto Social: Gere um impacto em sua comunidade com nosso Instituto de Impacto Social. Oferecemos a todos colaboradores dois dias de voluntariado pagos anualmente e oportunidades para se envolver em projetos de consultoria pro bono e iniciativas de Meio Ambiente, Sociais e de Governança (ESG). 
Fazendo um Impacto Real no Mundo: Somos uma das poucas empresas globalmente que auxilia seus clientes na busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. Trabalhando em conjunto com os profissionais e instituições que servimos, contribuímos para sustentar o estado de direito, fomentar o comércio, detectar infratores, relatar os fatos e oferecer informações confiáveis e imparciais para pessoas em todo o mundo.


Quem somos 

A Thomson Reuters informa o caminho adiante ao reunir conteúdo confiável e a tecnologia que pessoas e organizações precisam para tomar decisões corretas. Servimos profissionais nos setores jurídico, fiscal, contábil, de conformidade, governamental e de mídia. Nossos produtos combinam software altamente especializado e informações para capacitar profissionais com os dados, inteligência e soluções necessárias para tomar decisões informadas e ajudar as instituições em sua busca por justiça, verdade e transparência. A agência de notícias Reuters, parte da Thomson Reuters, é líder mundial na área de jornalismo e notícias confiáveis.

Contamos com o talento de 26.000 colaboradores em mais de 70 países, onde todos têm a oportunidade de contribuir e crescer profissionalmente em ambientes de trabalho flexíveis. Em um momento em que objetividade, precisão, equidade e transparência estão sob ataque, estamos comprometidos em buscá-los. Ficou interessado? Faça parte da nossa equipe e contribua para moldar as indústrias que impulsionam o progresso da sociedade.

Como uma empresa global, confiamos no conhecimento único, perspectivas e experiências de todos os colaboradores para cumprir nossos objetivos comerciais. Para garantir que possamos fazer isso, buscamos colaboradores talentosos e qualificados em todas as nossas operações ao redor do mundo, independentemente de raça, cor, sexo/gênero, incluindo gestantes, identidade e expressão de gênero, origem nacional, religião, orientação afetivo-sexual, deficiência, idade, estado civil, status de cidadania, ou outra classificação protegida pela lei aplicável.

Além disso, oferecemos acessibilidade para pessoas com deficiências e para aquelas com crenças religiosas sinceras, conforme a legislação vigente. Você pode encontrar mais informações sobre como solicitar uma adaptação aqui.

Descubra como se proteger de anúncios de emprego fraudulentos aqui. Para obter mais informações sobre a Thomson Reuters, visite nosso site em thomsonreuters.com

title: SEO Specialist

description:
About the job

This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a SEO Specialist based in Mexico.

As an SEO Specialist, you will take full ownership of organic search performance for a portfolio of high-growth automotive clients in a fully remote, performance-driven environment. This role goes beyond execution — it is designed for someone who thinks strategically, experiments continuously, and uses data to drive real ranking improvements. You will work closely with cross-functional teams including content creators, designers, and developers to deliver measurable SEO impact across multiple websites. Your work will directly influence organic traffic growth, local search visibility, and long-term digital performance. The environment encourages curiosity, testing, and evidence-based decision-making, where ideas are valued based on results rather than assumptions. This is an opportunity to shape SEO strategy end-to-end while working in a collaborative, fast-moving agency setting focused on real outcomes.

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.




Carestream is an Equal Opportunity Employer

Carestream is an equal opportunity organization. We recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote withoutregard to race, religion, creed, color, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status,disability, veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

Applying for a job with Carestream

All applicants must complete the on-line application process.

description:
About the job

Sobre nosotros

En Koltin, estamos rediseñando la forma en que cuidamos a nuestros papás, mamás, abuelos y abuelas, con el objetivo de ayudarles a mantenerse saludables, activos e independientes durante el mayor tiempo posible. Lo hacemos a través de nuestras membresías de salud, que integran:

Atención clínica enfocada en la prevención
Cobertura médica de gastos mayores
Programas de bienestar y comunidad

Somos la primera empresa en México que protege a personas adultas mayores, desde los 50 hasta los 84 años. Estamos creciendo rápidamente en todo el país, con un propósito claro: transformar la experiencia de salud para las Grandes Personas, haciéndola más humana, accesible y digna.




Sobre el puesto

Forma parte del equipo de Lifecycle, el área que convierte el backlog de leads de Koltin en ventas. Tu trabajo es en conjunto con el líder del área armar la estrategia y llevar a cabo la ejecución: operar los flujos de CRM, contactar leads en el momento correcto y asegurarse de que los que están listos para comprar lleguen al equipo de ventas.

Este no es un rol de soporte. Es un rol de conversión. Cada lead que reactiva y lleva al equipo de ventas representa una venta real — y eso se mide cada semana.




Responsabilidades

Ejecutar los flujos de reactivación del backlog diariamente según el playbook del Lead de CRM
Contactar leads de forma proactiva por los canales definidos (email, WhatsApp, llamada)
Calificar leads: identificar quién está listo para pasar al equipo de guías de ventas
Registrar todas las interacciones en HubSpot con precisión — tus datos alimentan las decisiones del equipo
Detectar qué mensajes y acciones funcionan mejor y reportarlo al Lead de CRM
Proponer mejoras al playbook cuando algo no funciona




Eres un buen fit si eres una persona que tiene

1-2 años en CRM, data analytics
Experiencia con HubSpot u otra herramienta de CRM
Orden y detalle: registras bien, no te saltas pasos
Comunicación escrita clara, empática y adaptada al segmento 60+
Capacidad de manejar volumen sin perder calidad de contacto
Orientación a resultados: sabes si te está yendo bien o no
Autonomía para priorizar sin que te digan qué hacer cada hora
Apertura para aprender e iterar rápido
Deseable: manejo de SQL




Que te ofrecemos

Rol con impacto directo — tus acciones se ven en el número de ventas cada semana
Equipo chico con dinámica de startup: aprendizaje rápido, decisión ágil
Remoto 100%
Sueldo competitivo + variable por meta de conversión
Proyección clara: este rol puede crecer hacia lead de CRM o roles de growth




Beneficios residiendo en México

🎓 Acceso a herramientas y beneficios para tu crecimiento profesional, como cursos, talleres, libros, etc.
💊 Asistencia médica privada por videollamada (médico general, nutriólogo y psicólogo) ilimitado para ti y 3 familiares

At least 1 year of experience managing social media accounts for a brand or agency.
Strong copywriting and content creation skills with an eye for visual storytelling.
Solid understanding of social media analytics and reporting.
Familiarity with paid ads, influencer outreach, or SEO is a plus.
Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.


Technical Requirements


Stable DSL, Cable, or Fiber internet connection (minimum 25 mbps for both download and upload speed).
Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.


What We Offer


Annual performance-based salary increases.
Health and dental insurance or a monthly health stipend.
Paid Time Off.
Holiday Bonus.
Recognition and performance incentives.
Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.


Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: SMM25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Social Media Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Ready to Join Us?

Be part of TalentPop’s mission to help brands grow and succeed online. Apply now and bring your creativity, strategy, and passion for social media to our team!

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent
Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

About the job

Descripción del puesto En el puesto de Especialista en CRM y automatización en Centro SanaMente te encargarás de diseñar, configurar y optimizar flujos de trabajo automatizados para la gestión de personas usuarias y pacientes potenciales. En tu día a día segmentarás bases de datos, crearás campañas automatizadas (emails, recordatorios, seguimientos) y monitorizarás su rendimiento para proponer mejoras continuas. Colaborarás con los equipos de marketing y atención al paciente para definir procesos, mejorar la experiencia de la persona usuaria y aumentar la conversión y fidelización. También documentarás los procesos, elaborarás informes periódicos y ayudarás a implementar nuevas herramientas o integraciones relacionadas con el CRM. Este es un puesto de media jornada (part time) y se desarrolla en modalidad remota.

Gestión de relaciones con personas usuarias y ventas: experiencia en Customer Relationship Management (CRM) y en procesos de ventas orientados a la fidelización y al acompañamiento personalizado.
Comunicación y trabajo colaborativo: excelentes habilidades de comunicación escrita y verbal, así como capacidad para coordinarte con equipos multidisciplinares de forma remota.
Gestión de proyectos: aptitudes en Project Management para planificar, priorizar y hacer seguimiento de iniciativas de automatización y mejora de procesos.




Requisitos no negociables:

Basado/a en México
Facturación activa (RFC con actividad económica vigente) — indispensable para formalizar la colaboración

Lo que ofrecemos:

Colaboración recurrente part-time con pago por honorarios
Autonomía real en las decisiones técnicas dentro de tu área




Si cumples los requisitos y te interesa, escríbeme por mensaje directo incluyendo: tu tarifa para la configuración inicial de WATI y tu esquema de cobro para secuencias de email (por proyecto, por hora o como lo manejes). Eso nos permite avanzar rápido.

skills: Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. Extraer y recopilar las métricas de rendimiento de las piezas publicadas en los diferentes canales digitales. Validar que todo el contenido se haya implementado en tiempo y forma. ¡Muchas gracias por tu interés en querer formar parte de nuestra familia #GenteViva!

En Viva nuestro principal propósito es que la gente se divierta, haga negocio y se conecte con sus seres queridos aprovechando la reducción de costo en el transporte aéreo.

¡Estamos seguros que con tu talento, seguiremos volando cada vez más alto!

Como Social Content Analyst serás responsable de contribuir a la fluidez operativa y logística del equipo de Content Marketing, que permita transformar el monitoreo de tendencias y la conversación digital en propuestas creativas que se puedan implementar, mientras se brinda soporte en la coordinación y ejecución de la estrategia de contenido.

Funciones Principales

Monitoreo de Tendencias y Creatividad


Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. Identificar de manera oportuna videos, formatos y temas virales en tendencia, traduciendo estos hallazgos en propuestas creativas e ideas accionables que permitan a la marca sumarse a la conversación digital de forma relevante y natural.

Tambien se encargará de documentar los acuerdos y minutas durante las sesiones de lluvia de ideas, dando un seguimiento puntual a las tareas para facilitar la comunicación interna y asegurar que la estrategia se traduzca de manera efectiva en la ejecución.


Análisis de Contenido


Extraer y recopilar las métricas de rendimiento de las piezas publicadas en los diferentes canales digitales. Validar que todo el contenido se haya implementado en tiempo y forma. Identificar formatos o publicaciones que hayan tenido un éxito sobresaliente para desarrollas mejores prácticas que sirvan como referencia y replicar en futuras producciones.

description:
About the job

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices

Qualifications

Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela

Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.
