title: Senior Executive Social, GOC
skills: Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.
Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia).
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines.
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines.
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting.
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams.
Bachelor’s degree.
Advanced English level (B2–C2).
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc.
Advanced Excel skills.
description:
About the job

About WPP Media

WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. 

WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

For more information, visit wppmedia.com.

Senior Executive Social, GOC

About WPP Media

WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.

WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com

At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP & WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:


Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity. 
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust. 
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise. 


Role Summary And Impact

As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for a Senior Executive Social who will:


Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia). 
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines. 
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines. 
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting. 
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams. 


Skills And Experience

If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:


Bachelor’s degree. 
Advanced English level (B2–C2). 
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc. 
Advanced Excel skills. 


Life At WPP Media & Benefits

Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include access to internal learning platforms, certifications, and training sessions, life insurance, wellness programs, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, employee mental health awareness day, and more. 

WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

For Mexico:

This position is available in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality. The candidate must perform their work from any location within Mexico. Only Mexican nationals residing in the country or foreign nationals with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work from abroad is not permitted under any circumstances.

For Colombia:

This position is in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality and must be performed within Colombian territory. Only candidates residing in Colombia with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work contracts do not allow employment or relocation abroad.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy ) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted. 

Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: Paid Search & Social Specialist
skills: Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.
1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.

description:
About the job

Launch Your Next Successful Chapter with Veta Virtual! 🚀




💸 Competitive Salary in USD | 🌍 100% Remote | 🎯 Paid Search & Social Role | 🏆 Award-Winning Agency Culture




Veta Virtual is hiring a Paid Search & Social Specialist for a high-growth client in the Digital Marketing industry — an award-winning agency specializing in the automotive vertical, recognized as Best Large SEO Agency and winner of Best Low Budget PPC Campaign at the 2024 US Search Awards. This is a learning-forward role for someone curious, resourceful, and ready to run real campaigns that push what is possible.




🔑 Your Role:




You will manage and optimize paid search and social campaigns for automotive dealership clients — trained and mentored by top specialists while taking real ownership of results. Your day-to-day will involve:




Managing and optimizing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns — delivering higher ROI and lower cost per conversion for automotive dealership clients.
Conducting daily account audits, budget pacing, and campaign adjustments to keep performance on track and spend optimized.
Generating performance reports from Google Ads and Meta — and conducting client calls to present strategies and results clearly and confidently.
Managing OEM reimbursement processes — reviewing requirements, gathering materials, and submitting claims accurately and on time.
Using Google Analytics, Data Studio, Tag Manager, Merchant Center, and Meta Ads Manager to analyze data and drive campaign improvements.
Collaborating with SEOs, writers, and designers on new experiments and client work — contributing to a team that tests, learns, and pushes boundaries daily.




✅ What You'll Need:




1+ year of hands-on Google Ads experience — able to build, manage, and optimize paid search campaigns confidently.
1+ year of Meta Ads experience — proficient in Facebook and Instagram campaign setup, targeting, and optimization inside Ads Manager.
Working knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Data Studio, Google Ads Editor, Google Tag Manager, and Google Merchant Center.
Prior agency experience — you understand client management, reporting, and the pace of agency work.
Detail-oriented, research-driven, and a strong communicator in written and spoken English.
Bonus: automotive vertical experience, OEM reimbursement knowledge, or campaigns you can show us with real results.
To be considered for this role, you must be currently based in Latin America (LATAM) or Europe.




💼 What We Offer:




💸 Competitive salary in USD — paid consistently every month.
🌴 10 paid vacation days per year plus all U.S. federal holidays.
💻 100% remote — open to candidates based in LATAM or Europe.
📈 Direct mentorship from top paid media specialists — real room to grow and own your campaigns inside a fast-moving agency.
🏆 A high-performance, collaborative culture where testing, learning, and pushing boundaries are part of daily life.
🤝 A supportive environment through Veta Virtual and our client where curiosity is rewarded and your growth is taken seriously from day one.




Ready to Apply?




If you are ready to run real campaigns, learn from the best, and grow inside one of the most innovative digital marketing agencies in the automotive space — apply now and launch your next chapter with Veta Virtual!




Once you apply, you will complete a short 2-minute video question — come ready to tell us about campaigns you have run and results you have driven. We can't wait to meet you!

description:
About the job

Sobre nosotros

En Koltin, estamos rediseñando la forma en que cuidamos a nuestros papás, mamás, abuelos y abuelas, con el objetivo de ayudarles a mantenerse saludables, activos e independientes durante el mayor tiempo posible. Lo hacemos a través de nuestras membresías de salud, que integran:

Atención clínica enfocada en la prevención
Cobertura médica de gastos mayores
Programas de bienestar y comunidad

Somos la primera empresa en México que protege a personas adultas mayores, desde los 50 hasta los 84 años. Estamos creciendo rápidamente en todo el país, con un propósito claro: transformar la experiencia de salud para las Grandes Personas, haciéndola más humana, accesible y digna.




Sobre el Puesto

Koltin tiene miles de leads que ya conocen el producto, mostraron interés y no compraron. Ese backlog es el activo más eficiente del negocio — el costo de adquisición ya fue pagado. Hoy está subutilizado. Tu trabajo es convertirlo en ventas reales con un sistema data-driven.

Tu meta en septiembre: 860 leads del backlog convertidos en venta — el 56% del total de ventas de Koltin. El rol es 100% data-driven: cada decisión se toma con números. Si construís el sistema y lo hacés escalar, el rol crece con vos.




Responsabilidades

Diseñar la estrategia de reactivación del backlog: segmentación, scoring, mensajes y timing
Construir y mantener el modelo de conversión: analizar variables que predicen quién va a comprar y cuando
Definir las metas de conversión mensuales, medir el funnel end-to-end y reportar a la VP de Growth
Diseñar y optimizar flujos de CRM en HubSpot — automatizaciones, triggers, secuencias — con foco en D+30+

Gestionar al ejecutor de CRM: asignar prioridades, revisar calidad de ejecución, dar feedback
Trabajar con el equipo de ventas para asegurar que los leads que pasan estén listos para cerrar
Construir el playbook de lifecycle — documentado y automatizado — que escale sin depender de vos




Eres un buen fit si eres una persona que tiene

3+ años en CRM, lifecycle o growth con foco en conversión
Experiencia construyendo flujos de nurturing y automatizaciones desde cero
Manejo avanzado de HubSpot u otra herramienta de CRM
Sólido en análisis de datos: sabes leer un funnel, identificar dónde se cae la conversión y actuar sobre eso

description:
About the job

NBCUniversal is one of the world's leading media and entertainment companies. We create world-class content, which we distribute across our portfolio of film, television, and streaming, and bring to life through our global theme park destinations, consumer products, and experiences. We own and operate leading entertainment and news brands, including NBC, NBC News, NBC Sports, Telemundo, NBC Local Stations, Bravo, and Peacock, our premium ad-supported streaming service. We produce and distribute premier filmed entertainment and programming through our powerhouse film and television studios, including Universal Pictures, DreamWorks Animation, and Focus Features, and the four global television studios under the Universal Studio Group banner, and operate industry-leading theme parks and experiences around the world through Universal Destinations & Experiences, including Universal Orlando Resort, home to Universal Epic Universe, and Universal Studios Hollywood. NBCUniversal is a subsidiary of Comcast Corporation. Visit www.nbcuniversal.com for more information.



Our impact is rooted in improving the communities where our employees, customers, and audiences live and work. We have a rich tradition of giving back and ensuring our employees have the opportunity to serve their communities. We champion an inclusive culture and strive to attract and develop a talented workforce to create and deliver a wide range of content reflecting our world.





Job Description



ROLE PURPOSE: In charge of strategic and operative promotional processes locally and regionally as well as the tactical implementation of Marketing activities related with third partners, media and exhibitions.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Marketing tactics.



Provide tactical and operational support to the Sr Promotions Manager (Mexico/LATAM). 
Handle the communication between the area and the creative agency, to brief, revise and approve creative concepts to be presented to potential third partners. Looks for new partner opportunities from different categories, verticals, trends and potential partnerships. Supports Sr. Promotions Manager in campaign presentations, promotional big ideas and ICO's (initial campaign overview). 
Support communication between partners and the different NBCU business contacts. 
Local/regional monitoring of the product exchange operational process. (Negotiation, follow up with contacts, ordering, shipping and reporting). 
Local/regional monitoring of the premieres of each promotional partner in every LATAM country when we have regional partnerships. (Initial request, follow up with contacts and reporting). 
Supports the Sr. Promotions Manager in pitching process. 
Monitor and measure success of the local/regional promotional campaigns. 
Creates campaign wrap reports (collects campaign testimonies, master graphics and key data from each partner/territory) that will serve as inspiration and support for future pitches. 
Supports the Sr. Promotions Manager in servicing NBCU internal teams and divisions in Symphony projects (Networks, CP, TVD, Streaming, Parks, etc.) to send assets, AV materials and prize packages. 
Coordinates promotional opportunities with local/regional exhibitors: Prize packages, menus, concessions, special formats, loyalty programs. 
Promotional process with record labels and editorial publishers

Administrative Process.



Fills operation formats (PAF, timeline), pitch lists, NDA's. 
Creates planning documents for internal purposes and marketing approvals (Local strategy/timeline for Mediacom)
Budget control administration (ODC, Budget adjustments)
Prize packages control and follow up with winners/ partner/agency. 
Supports Promotions Manager in logistics during HO visits. 
End to end premiums logistics and distribution. 
Custom Characters Tour Calendar partners). 
Collects information for promotional newsletters for tent pole films. 
Schedule meetings, conference calls and arrangements. 


Qualifications



Required skills & experience 



 



Requires a high level of service to business partners (brands, media and exhibitors). 
Highly proactive and organized person
Person with cordial, clear and concise communication. Strong verbal and written communication skills (working internationally)
Sense of Urgence
PR
Ability to work in a cross functional team
Teamwork and focus on detail

Additional Information



As part of our selection process, external candidates may be required to attend an in-person interview with an NBCUniversal employee at one of our locations prior to a hiring decision. NBCUniversal's policy is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, creed, gender, gender identity or expression, age, national origin or ancestry, citizenship, disability, sexual orientation, marital status, pregnancy, veteran status, membership in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other basis protected by applicable law.

description:
About the job

Join TalentPop App as an E-Commerce Sales Support Specialist!

At TalentPop App, we’re redefining how e-commerce brands connect with their customers — turning every interaction into an opportunity for engagement, retention, and sales. As an E-Commerce Sales Support Specialist, you’ll be the voice that helps customers complete their shopping journey, recover abandoned carts, and discover products they’ll love.

If you’re passionate about sales, thrive in an e-commerce environment, and enjoy converting conversations into conversions, this role is for you!

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: APPLICATION FAST-TRACK!

To ensure your application is reviewed by the Recruitment Team, you must follow these steps carefully. Applications that do not choose “Brand Concierge” and enter the correct code WILL NOT be reviewed.


When selecting the position during your application, please choose “Brand Concierge” from the list of available roles.
In the application form, you’ll be asked for an application code – please enter EXS in that field.


What You’ll Do


Customer Engagement: Assist customers via chat, email, phone, and SMS with inquiries about products, orders, and returns while promoting a positive and sales-oriented experience.
Drive Sales: Proactively identify opportunities for upselling, cross-selling, product bundling, and subscription recovery to increase conversions and customer retention.
Recover Opportunities: Support efforts like abandoned cart follow-ups, winbacks, and post-purchase engagement to maximize sales potential.
Order Management: Resolve order concerns quickly and accurately, turning potential issues into successful customer experiences.
Represent the Brand: Ensure every interaction reflects the brand’s identity, values, and tone for a consistent premium experience.
Insights & Collaboration: Track customer interactions and share trends with internal teams to optimize sales strategies and overall customer engagement.


What We’re Looking For


At least 1 year of proven remote/online sales and customer support experience.
Must have prior e-commerce experience (comfortable with upselling, cross-selling, subscription recovery, abandoned cart assistance, or post-purchase support).
Strong persuasive communication skills and a natural ability to convert leads and close opportunities through excellent relationship-building.
1 year of customer service experience via phone, email, or chat is required; e-commerce sales experience is a big plus.
Familiarity with Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, CRM tools, or customer engagement platforms is a plus.
Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and able to thrive in a fast-paced remote environment.


Technical Requirements


A personal PC or laptop with an i5 processor or higher.
A stable internet connection with at least 25 Mbps upload and download speeds.
A quiet, professional workspace for calls.


Why Join TalentPop App?


Earn commissions and enjoy annual performance-based raises.
Paid time off to relax and recharge.
HMO health coverage or a monthly health stipend for your well-being.
Performance and recognition bonuses for top achievers.
100% permanent work-from-home setup — skip the commute!
A supportive, friendly team culture with real opportunities for growth.


When applying, please include the application code BCS — it helps us review your application faster!

Ready to represent top e-commerce brands and help customers complete their online shopping journey? Apply now to become an E-Commerce Sales Support Specialist at TalentPop App!

description:
About the job

Patient Experience & Conversion Specialist (Remote)

Location: Remote (LATAM or Philippines Preferred)

Schedule: 30 or 40 hours Per Week (depending on business needs)

Working Hours: Must overlap with US Central Time (CST)

Compensation: $10-$15/hour




About the Opportunity:

Our client is a highly specialized concierge healthcare practice providing premium one-on-one care for individuals experiencing pelvic health, postpartum recovery, sexual health concerns, chronic pain, and other sensitive conditions.




We are seeking a Patient Experience & Conversion Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for prospective patients and play a direct role in converting inquiries into scheduled and paid evaluations.




This is not a traditional receptionist or administrative role. We are looking for someone with strong consultative sales ability, exceptional emotional intelligence, and the confidence to guide prospective patients through important healthcare decisions.




What You'll Do

Manage inbound inquiries via phone, email, text, website forms, and social media
Build trust and rapport with prospective patients discussing sensitive health concerns
Educate patients on the clinic's premium concierge care model
Present pricing confidently and professionally
Collect deposits and secure appointment commitments
Handle objections and guide patients toward scheduling care
Maintain consistent follow-up with prospective patients until a decision is reached
Track and manage opportunities throughout the patient journey
Build and maintain relationships with referring healthcare providers
Conduct outreach to referral partners and support referral growth initiatives




What Success Looks Like

High inquiry-to-appointment conversion rates
Consistent deposit collection
Strong patient satisfaction during the intake process
Effective follow-up and pipeline management
Positive relationships with referral partners




Required Qualifications

3+ years of experience in consultative sales, enrollment, admissions, patient conversion, customer success, or high-touch client-facing roles
Strong verbal and written communication skills
High emotional intelligence and empathy
Comfortable discussing pricing and handling objections
Ability to lead conversations confidently and professionally
Strong follow-through and ownership mentality
Ability to work independently in a remote environment




Preferred Qualifications

Experience in concierge healthcare, wellness, aesthetics, dental, physical therapy, or other premium service environments
Experience handling high-ticket services or premium consumer offerings
Background in patient intake, enrollment, admissions, or conversion-focused customer journeys
Experience working with emotionally sensitive client situations




Who Will Thrive In This Role

Natural relationship builders
Confident communicators
Consultative sales professionals
Individuals who enjoy helping people make important decisions
Professionals who can balance empathy with accountability




Who Is Not a Fit

Candidates seeking purely administrative or receptionist work
Individuals uncomfortable discussing pricing or collecting payments
Professionals who prefer reactive support rather than proactively guiding conversations
Candidates who struggle with follow-up, persuasion, or relationship building




If you enjoy meaningful conversations, building trust with people, and helping them take action toward improving their quality of life, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Desarrollador de Chatbot
description:
About the job

Allianz Partners

Is a world leader in B2B2C insurance and assistance, offering global solutions that span international health and life, travel insurance, automotive and assistance. Customer driven, our innovative experts are redefining insurance services by delivering future-ready, high-tech high-touch products and solutions that go beyond traditional insurance.

Our products are embedded seamlessly into our partners’ businesses or sold directly to customers and are available through four commercial brands: Allianz Assistance, Allianz Automotive, Allianz Travel and Allianz Care. Present in 75 countries, our 21,100 employees speak 70 languages, handle over 71 million cases each year, and are motivated to go the extra mile to offer peace of mind to our customers around the world.

We're looking for our new members!




This role is acting as global

AzP Conversational AI (CAI) Solution Engineer, located in the GCC Mexico.

Its mission is to help to develop and deploy effective Chatbots; Voicebots that meet the specific local needs.

This involves working closely with various internal and external stakeholders to understand the requirements, designing and building conversational AI systems that integrate with their existing technologies and core systems (e.g. CRM) and testing and optimizing the solution to ensure they deliver a high-quality user experience.




In order to be successful in this role, one will need:




Required Experience:




Knowledge of Chatbots, Conversational AI frameworks and technologies, such as STT (Speech-To-Text), TTS (Text-To-Speech), SSML (Speech Synthesis Markup Language) and NLP (Natural Language Processing), LLMs (Large Language Models).




Experience with Java Script, APIs, and other relevant technologies.




Understanding of the

principles of Conversational design and user experience (UX) for Conversational interfaces.




Expertise in programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, or similar

programming languages.




Understanding of

understanding of REST APIs and web services.




Knowledge of Agile methodology and experience in working with project management tools.




Experience in large-scale enterprise infrastructure and application landscape.




Advanced English level and Computer Science/Systems Engineering degree

is required.




Conversational AI Platform certification (Infobip, Cognigy etc.) is a plus.




Key Responsibilities:







Designing and developing chatbots, conversational flows, user interfaces and integration points/ extensions for Chat/Voicebots.




Developing and documenting processes and procedures for building and deploying Conversational AI solution.




Support Conversational AI operations projects with expertise.




Documenting technical changes, workflow related tasks and provide development status update where applicable.




Collaborating with other engineers and stakeholders to ensure that solutions are designed to be scalable, reliable, and maintainable.




Troubleshoot and resolve issues.




Continuously and self-independently drives asset enhancements and concept creation.




Providing technical guidance and support to AzP stakeholders during the development and deployment of their Conversational AI use cases.




Offer:




Direct hiring.




Remote work (must be based in Mexico City).




Full time

Monday - Friday schedule.




35-40k MXN Monthly salary (according to experience) + Food Coupons

+ Law benefits + Annual bonus + Health Insurance + Major Medical Expenses Insurance + Saving Fund.







Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges, is what makes us a unique employer. Together we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and has the confidence to explore, to grow and to shape a better future for our customers and the world around us.




We at Allianz believe in a diverse and inclusive workforce and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We encourage you to bring your whole self to work, no matter where you are from, what you look like, who you love or what you believe in. We therefore welcome applications regardless of ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, disability or sexual orientation. Great to have you on board. Let's care for tomorrow.

Advanced Agent Marketing Client Success Support Specialist

🆔 Job ID: TIMDEE2

🏢 Industry: Financial and Advisory Services

🌎 Location: LATAM

🕒 Job Status: Full Time

⏰ Work Schedule: The Client Success Support Specialist must be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours, especially during the hours when clients are actively taking apps, attending appointments, and submitting support requests. (9:00am to 5:00pm EST)

💰 Salary: This role pays approximately $10/hour, depending on experience and fit.

🚀 Target Start Date: asap




ROLE OVERVIEW




We are looking for a Client Success Support Specialist to support our Customer Success Managers with client communication, technical questions, CRM updates, app/order tracking, refund and credit-back requests, and basic conflict resolution.

This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, strong in written English, and comfortable helping clients work through process or technology-related questions. The right person will be able to communicate clearly, keep accurate records, follow up consistently, and make good decisions without needing step-by-step direction for every situation.




Key Responsibilities




The Client Success Support Specialist will assist the Customer Success team by answering client tech questions, helping clients understand apps and internal processes, and making sure client information is accurately updated in the CRM. This person will help monitor client availability, check integrations, track app/order status, and make sure clients understand how many apps they have remaining in their order.

This role will also help quality-check disposition calls, confirm that clients are following the correct appointment process, and make sure clients complete required Google Sheets or tracking forms after calls. The specialist will communicate with internal team members about apps that have been requested for credit-back, refund review, or additional follow-up.

In addition, this person will support offboarding, document client concerns, and help de-escalate frustrated clients in a professional manner. Common client situations may include refund requests, app credit-back requests, clients saying they were not looking for an annuity, did not want a specific state, had a poor call experience, did not want to join Zoom, or are already working with another advisor.




Core Responsibilities




Client Support

Answer client questions, provide written support, and help resolve basic client issues.

Technical Assistance

Help clients with app-related questions, tool access, integrations, and process confusion.

CRM Updates

Update client records, track availability, document issues, and maintain clean client data.

App & Order Tracking

Make sure clients receive apps on time and understand how many apps remain in their order.

Credit-Back & Refund Support

Track requests, communicate status internally, and gather context needed for review.

Process Follow-Up

Ensure clients follow the appointment process and complete required Google Sheets after calls.

Conflict Resolution

Help diffuse client frustration and escalate issues appropriately when needed.

Offboarding Support

Assist with client offboarding, documentation, and final communication steps.

Required Skills and Experience

The ideal candidate must be comfortable working across multiple systems and communicating quickly with both clients and internal team members. Experience with GoHighLevel/GHL and Slack is required. Strong written English is also important because this role involves client communication, internal updates, and accurate documentation.

We are not looking for someone who is simply “point and shoot.” This person needs to understand the situation, use good judgment, and decide when to resolve an issue directly versus when to escalate it to a Customer Success Manager or backend closer.

Online Engagement Specialist

This role combines real-time customer interaction with live chat technology to engage prospective clients, answer questions, qualify leads, and guide visitors toward scheduling a consultation with a Destination Wedding Specialist.

The ideal candidate is an outstanding communicator with exceptional written English, thrives in fast-paced environments, enjoys multitasking, and knows how to build meaningful customer interactions that convert interest into scheduled consultations.

description:
About the job

About WPP Media

WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. 

WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.

For more information, visit wppmedia.com.

Senior Executive Social, GOC

About WPP Media

WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.

WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com

At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP & WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:


Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity. 
Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust. 
Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise. 


Role Summary And Impact

As part of the Global Operations Centre (GOC), you will work closely with teams across the United States, Europe, and Asia to deliver high-impact solutions in a collaborative, multicultural environment. We are looking for a Senior Executive Social who will:


Develop strong relationships with counterparts in WPP Media’s regional teams (Europe, United States and Asia). 
Support campaigns on Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, etc., for clients, according to WPP Media guidelines. 
Ensure campaigns comply with WPP Media’s global policies and guidelines. 
Monitor campaigns daily on each of the platforms and ensure accuracy of data across platforms for campaign reporting. 
Generate daily campaign reports for reporting to regional teams. 


Skills And Experience

If this opportunity looks right for you, we are looking for candidates who have:


Bachelor’s degree. 
Advanced English level (B2–C2). 
Have 1.5-2 years of implementing and optimizing paid social campaigns in platforms such as: Facebook Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Instagram Ads, Twitter Ads, etc. 
Advanced Excel skills. 


Life At WPP Media & Benefits

Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include access to internal learning platforms, certifications, and training sessions, life insurance, wellness programs, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, employee mental health awareness day, and more. 

WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

For Mexico:

This position is available in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality. The candidate must perform their work from any location within Mexico. Only Mexican nationals residing in the country or foreign nationals with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work from abroad is not permitted under any circumstances.

For Colombia:

This position is in a Remote or Hybrid Work Modality and must be performed within Colombian territory. Only candidates residing in Colombia with a valid work permit may apply. Remote work contracts do not allow employment or relocation abroad.

title: Social Content Analyst
skills: Actuar como el radar del equipo mediante el monitoreo diario del entorno digital y la escucha activa de la comunidad y la competencia. description:
About the job

🚀 Marketing & Communications Assistant




📍 Location: On-site (remote possibility after training)

🕒 Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 5 PM (EST)

💼 Type: Full-time

🌐 Language: English B2–C1




🌟 About the Role

We are looking for a Marketing & Communications Assistant to support the execution of marketing initiatives and help maintain our digital presence.

This is a hands-on, entry-to-mid level role, ideal for someone organized, detail-oriented, and eager to grow within a marketing team.

You will work closely with the team to ensure campaigns, content, and communications are delivered effectively and on time.




🎯 Key Responsibilities

📱 Content & Social Media

Assist in creating and scheduling content across platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook)
Support the development of monthly content calendars
Monitor comments/messages and escalate when needed




📩 Email & Communications

Assist in the creation and scheduling of newsletters and email campaigns
Support communications with partners, donors, and prospects




🎨 Marketing Support

Update website content (non-technical)
Create simple marketing assets (social posts, flyers, visuals)
Support event promotion and coordination




📊 Campaign Execution

Assist in executing marketing campaigns across email and social media
Help organize and manage marketing assets (images, testimonials, content)




📈 Reporting & Tracking

Track basic performance metrics (engagement, email performance)
Support preparation of monthly reports and summaries




✅ Requirements

1–2 years of experience in marketing, communications, or a similar role
Basic knowledge of social media platforms and email marketing
Familiarity with tools such as Canva, Meta Business Suite, or similar (nice to have)
Strong written and verbal English skills (B2+)
Highly organized with strong attention to detail
Ability to follow direction, manage tasks, and meet deadlines




💡 What We’re Looking For

A proactive and reliable team player
Strong communication and organizational skills
Interest in digital marketing and content
Eagerness to learn and grow within a marketing team




If you're looking to build your career in marketing and gain hands-on experience across campaigns, content, and communications — we’d love to hear from you 🚀

Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.

Holiday Bonus.
Recognition and performance incentives.
Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.
description:
About the job

TalentPop is a fast-growing e-commerce support company dedicated to helping brands thrive in today’s digital landscape. As we expand, we’re looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to join our team. If you’re passionate about building engaging online communities, driving brand awareness, and turning followers into customers, we’d love to meet you!

What You’ll Do


Develop and execute social media strategies across platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to grow reach and engagement.
Plan, create, and schedule engaging content (graphics, videos, captions, and stories) aligned with brand voice and campaign goals.
Monitor performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on insights.
Stay up-to-date on trends, competitor activity, and platform updates to keep our content fresh and relevant.
Collaborate with the marketing team on integrated campaigns, paid ads, and influencer partnerships.
Engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and fostering meaningful interactions.
Support email and digital marketing initiatives with social-first content ideas.


What We’re Looking For


At least 1 year of experience managing social media accounts for a brand or agency.
Strong copywriting and content creation skills with an eye for visual storytelling.
Solid understanding of social media analytics and reporting.
Familiarity with paid ads, influencer outreach, or SEO is a plus.
Highly organized, creative, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.


Technical Requirements


Stable DSL, Cable, or Fiber internet connection (minimum 25 mbps for both download and upload speed).
Personal PC or laptop with a minimum i5 processor.


What We Offer


Annual performance-based salary increases.
Health and dental insurance or a monthly health stipend.
Paid Time Off.
Holiday Bonus.
Recognition and performance incentives.
Career growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling company.


Important: To be considered for this position, please make sure to include the following application code in your submission: SMM25. This code helps us quickly identify applicants for the Social Media Marketing Specialist role. Applications submitted without this code may experience delays in processing. Be sure to highlight it clearly when you apply so our recruitment team knows you’ve carefully read the job posting.

Ready to Join Us?

Be part of TalentPop’s mission to help brands grow and succeed online. Apply now and bring your creativity, strategy, and passion for social media to our team!

title: Community Manager
description:
About the job

Job Title: Community Manager




Job Type: Full-time




Location: Remote - Latin America




Job Summary:




Join our team as a dynamic Community Manager and play a pivotal role in creating a positive, collaborative, and engaged online environment. You will be at the forefront of customer support and community moderation, proactively resolving issues, answering questions, and ensuring a welcoming experience for all members. If you thrive in fast-paced remote settings and are eager to make a meaningful impact every day, this role is for you.




Key Responsibilities:




• Monitor and moderate online communities to ensure a safe, respectful, and inclusive atmosphere.

• Address customer complaints and questions promptly with empathy and professionalism.

• De-escalate conflicts and diffuse tense situations to maintain group harmony.

• Develop proactive engagement strategies to foster a vibrant and active community.

• Collaborate with internal teams to relay feedback and insights from the community.

• Manage time efficiently to handle multiple conversations and tasks in a remote environment.

• Create clear, friendly, and effective written and verbal communications across channels.




Required Skills and Qualifications:




• Proven experience in customer support and online community moderation.

• Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; a genuine care for clear and empathetic messaging.

• Strong conflict management and de-escalation abilities.

• Self-starter attitude with high energy and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

• Excellent time management skills in a remote work setting.

• Keen attention to detail and ability to multitask under pressure.

• Adaptable, with a willingness to go the extra mile to support community needs.




Preferred Qualifications:




• Background in managing large-scale online communities.

• Experience with various community platforms and CRM tools.

• Passion for building lasting relationships and driving positive user experiences.

title: Talent Account Executive 1
description:
About the job

LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.



Join us to transform the way the world works.





Job Description



This role will be based in Mexico City.



At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team. 



LinkedIn is looking for a Talent Solutions Account Executive I (TAE1) to join our New Business team in Mexico City. This role is focused on driving new customer acquisition across a high-volume SMB territory, building strong pipeline through outbound prospecting, and closing new business opportunities across Hiring and Learning solutions. 



Success in this role requires strong discipline in pipeline management, excellent time management, and the ability to prioritize effectively across a large number of accounts and opportunities. The ideal candidate is highly organized, action-oriented, collaborative, leverages AI and data to increase productivity, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-activity sales environment. While the territory is primarily SMB-focused, the ability to identify and close larger strategic opportunities is considered a strong differentiator. 



Responsibilities:



• Own new business acquisition within a defined SMB territory, ensuring strong account coverage and prioritization of the highest-potential opportunities 

• Develop and execute a territory strategy focused on scale, efficiency, and consistent pipeline generation 

• Generate pipeline through proactive outbound prospecting (self-prospection and in partnership with SDs + partners) and effectively manage inbound opportunities 

• Build and maintain a strong, healthy pipeline across all funnel stages, ensuring high activity, progression, and conversion 

• Manage a high volume of opportunities simultaneously, with strong organization, time management, and prioritization discipline 

• Run effective discovery conversations to understand customer needs and position Hiring and Learning solutions accordingly 

• Execute pilot-led sales motions, including onboarding, engagement, and conversion into long-term partnerships 

• Maintain accurate forecasting and high standards of CRM hygiene 

• Consistently meet or exceed quota targets through strong execution and disciplined funnel management 

• Identify and drive cross-sell opportunities, especially expanding into Learning solutions 

• Identify larger strategic opportunities within the territory and navigate them effectively when present 

• Leverage AI tools and data insights to improve productivity, prospecting quality, and deal execution 

• Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (SDs, ADs, Marketing, Partners) to maximize opportunity creation and success 

• Share market insights and contribute to the development of team best practices





Qualifications



Basic Qualifications:



• Fluency in Spanish and English 

• 3+ years of sales experience 



Preferred Qualifications:



• Proven track record of closing new business in B2B/SaaS environments 

• Experience with HR tech, recruiting solutions, or software sales 

• Strong prospecting, organization, and pipeline management skills 

• Experience managing high-volume sales cycles with efficiency and consistency 

• Data-driven mindset with ability to prioritize and make informed decisions 



Suggested Skills 



• Pipeline Management 

• Territory Planning & Prioritization 

• Time & Volume Management 

• Prospecting Excellence 

• Pilot Management 

• AI Usage for Sales Productivity 

• Consultative / Value-Based Selling 

• Forecasting 

• Cross-functional Collaboration 

• Opportunity Qualification 





Additional Information



Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates 



Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/candidate-portal.

description:
About the job

NOW HIRING: Social Media Manager & Content Strategist

Compensation: $7–$10/hour

Location: Remote (LATAM Candidates Preferred)

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Time Zone: EST




We are partnering with a premium luxury hospitality and personal branding company seeking a highly strategic Social Media Manager & Content Strategist to lead content growth across multiple brands targeting both professional chefs and high-net-worth clientele.




This is NOT a content scheduling role.




We are looking for someone who can own the entire content lifecycle—from strategy and messaging to execution and performance analysis—with a strong focus on lead generation, conversion, and brand positioning.




What You'll Do:

• Develop and execute content strategies for multiple brands

• Manage Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, and YouTube Shorts

• Create high-converting captions, hooks, CTAs, and content messaging

• Build and maintain content calendars (minimum 5 posts/week)

• Create detailed creative briefs for video editors

• Manage community engagement and lead qualification through comments and DMs

• Track and report performance metrics and business outcomes




Requirements:

3–5+ years of Social Media Management and Content Strategy experience
Proven Instagram and TikTok growth results with metrics
Exceptional English copywriting skills
Strong understanding of short-form video strategy and viral content
Experience managing different audience personas and brand voices
Background in luxury, hospitality, food, lifestyle, or personal branding industries
Experience using content as a lead generation and conversion tool




Nice to Have:

Private chef or luxury hospitality experience
Founder/personal brand experience
ManyChat or DM automation experience
Proven inbound lead generation through organic content

description:
About the job

NBCUniversal is one of the world's leading media and entertainment companies. We create world-class content, which we distribute across our portfolio of film, television, and streaming, and bring to life through our global theme park destinations, consumer products, and experiences. We own and operate leading entertainment and news brands, including NBC, NBC News, NBC Sports, Telemundo, NBC Local Stations, Bravo, and Peacock, our premium ad-supported streaming service. We produce and distribute premier filmed entertainment and programming through our powerhouse film and television studios, including Universal Pictures, DreamWorks Animation, and Focus Features, and the four global television studios under the Universal Studio Group banner, and operate industry-leading theme parks and experiences around the world through Universal Destinations & Experiences, including Universal Orlando Resort, home to Universal Epic Universe, and Universal Studios Hollywood. NBCUniversal is a subsidiary of Comcast Corporation. Visit www.nbcuniversal.com for more information.



Our impact is rooted in improving the communities where our employees, customers, and audiences live and work. We have a rich tradition of giving back and ensuring our employees have the opportunity to serve their communities. We champion an inclusive culture and strive to attract and develop a talented workforce to create and deliver a wide range of content reflecting our world.





Job Description



ROLE PURPOSE: In charge of strategic and operative promotional processes locally and regionally as well as the tactical implementation of Marketing activities related with third partners, media and exhibitions.

Creates campaign wrap reports (collects campaign testimonies, master graphics and key data from each partner/territory) that will serve as inspiration and support for future pitches.

Custom Characters Tour Calendar partners).

Qualifications

As part of our selection process, external candidates may be required to attend an in-person interview with an NBCUniversal employee at one of our locations prior to a hiring decision. About the job

Role: Digital Marketing Executive (Work From Home)
Job Type: Part-Time Contract
Location: Remote (Work From Home)

About the Role

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.




What You'll Do

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency

What We're Looking For

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow evaluation guidelines

What You Get

Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly
Fully remote - work from anywhere
Flexible hours - you set your own schedule

Equal Opportunity Employer:

title: Remote Marketing Strategist
skills: Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.
Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.
The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.

Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.

Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.
Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.
Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.
description:
About the job

HireLatam is a premier recruitment agency that places top Latin American talent in independent contractor roles in US companies. With a proven track record and a commitment to excellence, we're your trusted partner in the pursuit of career success. Our extensive network, personalized approach, and supportive guidance ensure that you're in the best hands to find your next job opportunity.




Job Title: Remote Marketing Strategist (100% Work From Home) 

Location: Remote from Latin America

Position Type: Full-time

Salary: $1,200 – $3,000 USD/month (Fully dependent on creative skill level, qualifications, and design output speed)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Eastern Time (EST), featuring a structured 1-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM EST.




About our Client




Our Client is a fast-growing, data-driven enterprise that relies on cutting-edge digital acquisition to scale its market presence. Operating with a high-velocity, performance-first marketing team, they prioritize conversion metrics over vanity metrics. They foster an agile, collaborative remote environment where creative assets are constantly measured, iterated upon, and optimized to drive real business growth and pipeline value.




The Role




Our Client is seeking a high-output, conversion-oriented Performance Designer to take complete ownership of visual assets across the entire customer acquisition funnel. This is not a traditional branding role focused solely on aesthetics; it is a high-ownership position where design must directly drive performance. The successful candidate will blend creative mastery with analytical reasoning to engineer thumb-stopping social ads, high-converting landing page layouts, engaging email campaigns, and short-form motion graphics that systematically guide users toward a definitive Call to Action (CTA).




Key Responsibilities




Paid Media Ad Creative & Motion Design




Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.




Web Layouts, Lifecycle Marketing & Iterative Testing




Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.







Qualifications, Skills, and Key Competencies




Required Qualifications




The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.
Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.
Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.




Preferred Qualifications




Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.




Benefits




Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.

title: Email Marketing Account Manager
skills: You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.

Minh Vo - Founder
description:
About the job

I’m helping Email Clout find a top candidate to join their team flexible for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager.




You'll drive revenue and client success by independently managing end-to-end email marketing campaigns.




Compensation:

USD 300 - 1.5K/month




Location:

Remote: Mexico




Mission of Email Clout:

"Empower online brands with high-impact, revenue-driving email campaigns. Fast, accountable, and world-class results."




What makes you a strong candidate:

You are proficient in Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting.
You have the potential to develop in Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma.
English - Fully fluent




Responsibilities and more:

Email Clout is an email marketing agency that partners with online brands to create unique, engaging, and revenue-generating email campaigns and flows. We’re fully remote, small, and love to move fast. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering a world-class client experience and industry-shattering email performance. 




We are looking for the ideal candidate for the role of Email Marketing Account Manager, who will be responsible for the experience and performance of client accounts. In this role, you will manage and execute email marketing campaigns and flows from start to finish. This includes coming up with ideas, planning, writing copy, communicating with clients and internal teams, as well as implementation in Klaviyo. You will use Klaviyo and Figma while managing your tasks independently through Notion. Below are the key responsibilities for this role. 




- Create and manage multiple email content calendars. 

- Plan, write, and schedule email marketing campaigns and flows. 

- Collect, report, present, and analyze past data to make the best decisions for clients. 

- Conduct and lead client calls. 

- Handle difficult questions related to email performance. 

- Make design and copy changes in Figma. 

- Collaborate and manage designers and copywriters. 

- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in email marketing. 




Software stack you’ll be using: 

- Slack 

- Klaviyo 

- Figma 

- Shopify 

- Notion 




Requirements: 

- 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, preferably with experience using Klaviyo. 

- Proficiency in Figma or similar design software. 

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 

- Strong attention to detail and multitasking ability. 

- Familiarity with email marketing best practices and metrics. 

- Confident in communicating with clients. 

- Perfect English (spoken and written). 




Do Not Apply If: 

- You’re okay with delays or errors in client work. 

- You’re willing to work only during regular hours. 

- You can only write when assisted by ChatGPT. 

- You don’t take deadlines seriously. 

- You lack urgency in completing work. 

- You don’t have the resourcefulness to solve problems on your own first. 

- You don’t feel confident in your email marketing abilities.




Your potential leader(s):

Minh Vo - Founder



Desired Skills and Experience

Project management, Marketing strategy, Email marketing, Data analytics, Copywriting, Client communication, Slack, Shopify, Notion, Figma

description:
About the job

This role is open to candidates based in LATAM, Africa, and Eastern Europe. Please note that as this role supports U.S.-based clients, candidates must be available to work during U.S. business hours aligned with the client’s time zone.

Our client is a hospitality management organization that owns and operates multiple hotels, restaurants, food service brands, and hospitality-focused businesses. Their portfolio includes full-service hotels, restaurant concepts, hospitality venues, and service-based businesses that require consistent brand management, marketing execution, guest engagement, and operational coordination. As the organization continues to grow, they are seeking a Marketing Coordinator to support marketing operations, campaign execution, digital presence management, social media coordination, email marketing, advertising, reporting, and administrative functions across multiple brands and locations.

Role Overview

The Marketing Coordinator will be responsible for supporting day-to-day marketing operations across multiple hospitality, restaurant, and service brands. The Marketing Coordinator will help manage marketing projects, social media scheduling, website updates, email and SMS campaigns, advertising support, reporting, reputation management, influencer coordination, and administrative workflows. This role is ideal for a highly organized marketing professional who enjoys managing multiple projects simultaneously, supporting cross-functional teams, and ensuring marketing initiatives are executed efficiently and consistently across multiple locations.

Location

Fully Remote | 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST

Key Responsibilities

Marketing Project Management


Maintain marketing calendars, promotional calendars, and holiday campaign schedules.
Track campaign deadlines, project timelines, and marketing deliverables.
Coordinate requests between ownership, operations teams, vendors, agencies, and creative resources.
Attend recurring meetings with hotel, restaurant, and hospitality properties.
Follow up on outstanding marketing initiatives and project deliverables.
Maintain organized marketing documentation and workflows.
Experience using Trello or other PMO tools.


Website & Digital Presence Management


Update websites using WordPress and Wix.
Maintain online menus, promotions, seasonal offerings, and business information.
Update and manage Google Business Profiles.
Upload and organize photos, videos, and digital assets across websites and listings.
Maintain accurate business information across OpenTable, Resy, Yelp, Apple Maps, and related platforms.
Support SEO and AEO improvement initiatives through implementation of audits and recommendations.


Social Media Marketing

Coordinate content shoots with photographers and videographers.
Monitor messages and escalate items requiring management attention.
Generate recurring social media analytics reports.
Support social media consistency across all brands and locations.


Email & SMS Marketing


Build and schedule email marketing campaigns.
Build and coordinate SMS marketing campaigns.
Maintain customer databases and mailing lists.
Support promotional marketing initiatives through email and SMS channels.
Track and report on email and SMS campaign performance.


Digital Advertising


Create and manage Meta Ads campaigns.
Monitor Google Ads campaign performance.
Track advertising budgets and marketing spend.
Prepare advertising performance reports.
Research audience targeting opportunities and campaign optimizations.


Public Relations & Influencer Marketing


Research and contact local media outlets.
Identify and evaluate influencers and content creators.
Coordinate influencer partnerships and promotional visits.
Maintain influencer and media contact databases.
Assist with press release distribution and media outreach efforts.
Track media placements and coverage performance.


Graphic & Creative Support


Support simple creative updates using Canva and related tools.
Update menus, event materials, and sales collateral.
Assist with maintaining brand consistency across marketing assets.
Support creative asset organization and management.


Reputation Management


Monitor online reviews across multiple platforms.
Draft review responses for management approval.
Track review scores and guest feedback across locations.
Create reputation management reports.
Support guest satisfaction and review management initiatives.


Reporting & Analytics


Compile monthly marketing reports.
Track campaign performance across channels.
Pull social media, email marketing, website, and campaign analytics.
Monitor website traffic and engagement trends.
Create tracking links and performance dashboards.
Develop executive summary reports utilizing AI-enabled workflows.


Administrative Support


Conduct market and competitor research.
Organize shared drives and marketing assets.
Coordinate vendors, agencies, photographers, media partners, and contractors.
Support special projects and operational initiatives as assigned.
Assist with maintaining efficient marketing operations and workflows.


Qualifications Experience


2+ years of experience in marketing, social media, digital marketing, or marketing coordination.
Experience supporting multiple brands, locations, or business units preferred.
Hospitality, restaurant, hotel, food service, or multi-location business experience preferred.
Experience coordinating marketing campaigns across multiple channels.
Experience supporting social media, email marketing, and digital advertising initiatives.
Experience working with websites, online listings, and digital business profiles.
Experience compiling reports and analyzing marketing performance data.
Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, etc.


Qualifications Skills


Strong social media management capabilities.
Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager.
Understanding of email marketing platforms and campaign execution.
Proficiency with WordPress, Wix, Google Business Profiles, OpenTable, Resy, and related digital platforms.
Familiarity with Mailchimp, SevenRooms, Toast POS, and hospitality-focused marketing systems.
Strong organizational and project coordination skills.
Strong reporting and analytics capabilities.
Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
Familiarity with Canva and marketing asset management.
Familiarity with Microsoft Teams, Zoom & Apple Notes.
Strong problem-solving and administrative coordination skills.
Strong ownership and accountability mindset.


What Success Looks Like


Marketing campaigns and promotions are executed consistently and on schedule.
Social media engagement and digital presence remain active and well-maintained.
Marketing projects are completed efficiently across multiple brands and locations.
Marketing and operational teams remain aligned and coordinated.
Advertising, email marketing, and promotional efforts contribute to business growth.
Reporting provides visibility into campaign performance and marketing effectiveness.
Marketing operations remain organized, scalable, and efficient.


Opportunity

This is an opportunity to join a growing hospitality organization and contribute directly to the marketing efforts of multiple hotel, restaurant, and hospitality brands. The Marketing Coordinator will gain exposure to a wide range of marketing channels, operational functions, and brand initiatives while helping drive guest engagement, brand visibility, and business growth. This role offers significant variety, ownership, and opportunities for continued professional development within hospitality marketing.

Application Process

To be considered for this role these steps need to be followed:


Fill in the application form
Record a video showcasing your skill sets

description:
