🌎 Why goFLUENT?

Because you’re not just managing accounts — you’re helping companies in Mexico connect with the world and grow globally.

If you're ready to build meaningful client relationships, drive impact, and grow your career, we’d love to hear from you!

👉 Apply here: https://www.gofluent.com/us-en/careers/

title: Content & SEO Specialist
skills: Eligibility: This position is open to candidates residing in Latin America.
Application Language: Please submit your CV in English. Applications submitted in other languages will not be considered.

Professional Presentation: We encourage you to showcase your professional experience by including a Loom video in the application form. While this is optional, candidates who provide a video presentation will be given priority.
Interview Policy: The use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools during interviews are strictly prohibited.

Note: As part of the final stages of our hiring process, candidates may be asked to provide professional references for a reference check. If hired, you may also be asked to update your LinkedIn profile :)
AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing
Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent
Fact-check, improve clarity, and ensure editorial quality (no “AI-sounding” content)
Publish 2–4 blog posts per week into a CMS (proper formatting: H1/H2/H3, meta title, meta description, slug)
Source and integrate relevant visuals for every post (hero images, diagrams, screenshots where relevant)
Ensure images are contextually relevant, correctly sized, and include alt text
Add internal links following the hub-and-spoke structure
Implement FAQ schema markup where applicable (training provided)
Maintain tracking in the content calendar (status, publish date, URL, performance notes)
Weekly Newsletter
Draft one newsletter per week in an email platform (e.g., Klaviyo or equivalent)
Curate 2–3 external insights (industry news, posts, tools, studies)
Write concise commentary and framing around each item
Include links to newly published content
Maintain a clear, non-promotional tone focused on value and relevance
Schedule, test, and send each issue
Monitor open and click-through rates weekly and flag performance trends
LinkedIn Content (1–2 Posts Weekly)
Write 1–2 posts per week for a company LinkedIn page
Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded
Pull insights from blog content, product use cases, customer conversations, or sales insights
Create or source supporting visuals (screenshots, simple graphics, text-based visuals)
Schedule posts using a social scheduling tool or native platform
Monitor engagement and flag important comments or mentions for response
Template Pages & Gated Content
Write landing page copy for template downloads (based on provided briefs)
Format templates into usable assets (PDF, Slides, or Docs)
Publish gated landing pages in CMS with email capture integration
Ensure proper metadata, internal linking, and conversion flow
Maintain consistency between page copy and downloadable asset
Strong experience using AI writing tools effectively (knows the difference between edited output and raw AI content)
Ability to write clearly, directly, and without corporate or filler language
Experience publishing content in a CMS environment
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage workload independently
Ability to source relevant, context-aware visuals
Comfortable receiving editorial feedback and iterating quickly
Experience with CMS platforms (e.g., Webflow or similar)
Email marketing experience
Basic SEO understanding (metadata, structure, internal linking)
Experience writing for B2B audiences (sales, revenue, or SaaS context)
Familiarity with CRM ecosystems
Experience with LinkedIn content creation and distribution
description:
About the job

Hi there! We are South and our client is looking for a Content & SEO Specialist!

Note To Applicants


Eligibility: This position is open to candidates residing in Latin America. 
Application Language: Please submit your CV in English. Applications submitted in other languages will not be considered. 
Professional Presentation: We encourage you to showcase your professional experience by including a Loom video in the application form. While this is optional, candidates who provide a video presentation will be given priority. 
Interview Policy: The use of artificial intelligence (AI) tools during interviews are strictly prohibited. 
Note: As part of the final stages of our hiring process, candidates may be asked to provide professional references for a reference check. If hired, you may also be asked to update your LinkedIn profile :)


The Core Job (Non-Negotiable)

These Four Areas Define Success In This Role


 AI-Assisted Blog Content → CMS Publishing


You will execute a structured content strategy that includes keyword research, content briefs, and a hub-and-spoke architecture already in place.

Your responsibility is to turn briefs into high-quality, published content.


Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to generate first drafts from content briefs and keywords
Rewrite and refine AI output so it reads natural, human, and brand-consistent
Fact-check, improve clarity, and ensure editorial quality (no “AI-sounding” content)
Publish 2–4 blog posts per week into a CMS (proper formatting: H1/H2/H3, meta title, meta description, slug)
Source and integrate relevant visuals for every post (hero images, diagrams, screenshots where relevant)
Ensure images are contextually relevant, correctly sized, and include alt text
Add internal links following the hub-and-spoke structure
Implement FAQ schema markup where applicable (training provided)
Maintain tracking in the content calendar (status, publish date, URL, performance notes)
 Weekly Newsletter


Own a weekly email newsletter sent to a B2B audience (sales and revenue professionals).


Draft one newsletter per week in an email platform (e.g., Klaviyo or equivalent)
Curate 2–3 external insights (industry news, posts, tools, studies)
Write concise commentary and framing around each item
Include links to newly published content
Maintain a clear, non-promotional tone focused on value and relevance
Schedule, test, and send each issue
Monitor open and click-through rates weekly and flag performance trends
 LinkedIn Content (1–2 Posts Weekly)


Manage consistent organic presence on LinkedIn.


Write 1–2 posts per week for a company LinkedIn page
Avoid generic “corporate thought leadership” tone — keep it specific, practical, and grounded
Pull insights from blog content, product use cases, customer conversations, or sales insights
Create or source supporting visuals (screenshots, simple graphics, text-based visuals)
Schedule posts using a social scheduling tool or native platform
Monitor engagement and flag important comments or mentions for response
 Template Pages & Gated Content


Build and publish downloadable, conversion-focused content assets.


Write landing page copy for template downloads (based on provided briefs)
Format templates into usable assets (PDF, Slides, or Docs)
Publish gated landing pages in CMS with email capture integration
Ensure proper metadata, internal linking, and conversion flow
Maintain consistency between page copy and downloadable asset


Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who is highly proficient in AI-assisted content production and can maintain quality at volume.

Required Skills


Strong experience using AI writing tools effectively (knows the difference between edited output and raw AI content)
Ability to write clearly, directly, and without corporate or filler language
Experience publishing content in a CMS environment
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage workload independently
Ability to source relevant, context-aware visuals
Comfortable receiving editorial feedback and iterating quickly


Strong Plus


Experience with CMS platforms (e.g., Webflow or similar)
Email marketing experience
Basic SEO understanding (metadata, structure, internal linking)
Experience writing for B2B audiences (sales, revenue, or SaaS context)
Familiarity with CRM ecosystems
Experience with LinkedIn content creation and distribution


Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET

Compensation: USD salary

Location: 100% remote opportunity

If this opportunity sounds good to you, send us your resume!

description:
About the job

Job Title: Web Developer (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices
Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality
Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities
Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines
Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses
Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements




Qualifications

Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome
Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust
Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline

Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela

Flexible workload depending on project availability

Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.

title: Content Specialist, Video Production
skills: Bring a strong perspective on what makes video content hook viewers, including scripting techniques, editing and pacing strategies, and visual structure.
Support the development of video content for Study.com and marketing channels, with a strong emphasis on optimizing for YouTube & TikTok engagement and discoverability.
Onboard, manage, and support a group of freelance video creators and video editors to ensure high-quality and efficient video creation
Track production rates, identify project bottlenecks, and resolve blockers to meet weekly, monthly, and quarterly goals
Write, edit, and update standard operating practices to ensure operational efficiency across video projects

Analyze video performance and incorporate insights to iterate on scripting/editing to increase social engagement rate, including formats inspired by successful content outside of traditional educational content (e.g., listicles, explainers, visual essays, "study with me").
Provide ongoing feedback, direction, and performance analysis to support content strategy.
Leverage performance data to identify effective video formats, and iteratively refine our strategy through insight-driven ideation
Use AI and tech tools to streamline production (Claude desktop, Langflow, etc) and improve video quality with video first AI tools (HeyGen, Elevenlabs, etc)

Strong project management and communication skills with the ability to track multiple content production streams, manage freelancer relationships, and collaborate effectively across cross-functional teams.
2–3 years of video production experience with a strong understanding of project management, social media marketing, and the YouTube and TikTok ecosystem.
A portfolio of social media videos produced or YouTube/TikTok channels they have managed or contributed to
Experienced in creating video titles according to SEO best practices, scripting, storyboarding, producing videos, and collaborating with editors.
Data-savvy and comfortable making recommendations based on performance insights to improve video engagement and viewer retention.
Skilled in sourcing and guiding freelance video content creators and editors to produce engaging, platform-optimized content.

description:
About the job

Our mission is to open the door to the life-changing impact of education. We build market-leading, online college credit and test-preparation solutions that help working adults earn their degrees, advance their careers, and achieve economic mobility. Recognized by Fast Company and GSV 150 as one of the world’s most innovative education companies, we are also at the forefront of AI-first learning, combining artificial intelligence with the latest learning science to improve access and outcomes at scale.




Our product is our impact. Through our Keys to College and Keys to the Classroom initiatives, we have saved students over $700 million in tuition and enabled hundreds of thousands of learners to pursue and succeed in careers across nursing, teaching, counseling, business, and other high-demand fields. We are deeply focused on measurable outcomes and building products that create meaningful, lasting change in people’s lives.




The contractor will be expected to work PST business hours. Additionally, they will need to use their own computer and have reliable access to high-speed internet.




Job Description




Bring a strong perspective on what makes video content hook viewers, including scripting techniques, editing and pacing strategies, and visual structure.
Support the development of video content for Study.com and marketing channels, with a strong emphasis on optimizing for YouTube & TikTok engagement and discoverability.
Onboard, manage, and support a group of freelance video creators and video editors to ensure high-quality and efficient video creation
Track production rates, identify project bottlenecks, and resolve blockers to meet weekly, monthly, and quarterly goals
Write, edit, and update standard operating practices to ensure operational efficiency across video projects
Analyze video performance and incorporate insights to iterate on scripting/editing to increase social engagement rate, including formats inspired by successful content outside of traditional educational content (e.g., listicles, explainers, visual essays, "study with me").
Provide ongoing feedback, direction, and performance analysis to support content strategy.
Leverage performance data to identify effective video formats, and iteratively refine our strategy through insight-driven ideation
Use AI and tech tools to streamline production (Claude desktop, Langflow, etc) and improve video quality with video first AI tools (HeyGen, Elevenlabs, etc)




Requirements




Strong project management and communication skills with the ability to track multiple content production streams, manage freelancer relationships, and collaborate effectively across cross-functional teams.
2–3 years of video production experience with a strong understanding of project management, social media marketing, and the YouTube and TikTok ecosystem.
A portfolio of social media videos produced or YouTube/TikTok channels they have managed or contributed to
Experienced in creating video titles according to SEO best practices, scripting, storyboarding, producing videos, and collaborating with editors.
Data-savvy and comfortable making recommendations based on performance insights to improve video engagement and viewer retention.
Skilled in sourcing and guiding freelance video content creators and editors to produce engaging, platform-optimized content.




At Study.com, we know that strong communities are built on the power of our diversity, and we respect and strive to understand for the diverse identities, race, ethnicities, backgrounds, and perspectives of our team members. Our work and company culture have been consistently recognized, including:

Inc. Best Place to Work
Fortune Great Places to Work – Best Workplaces in the Bay Area
Golden Bridge Awards – Gold Winner, Corporate Social Responsibility
San Francisco Business Times & Silicon Valley Business Journal – Best Places to Work




Study.com provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, veteran or disability status. In addition to federal law requirements.




Study.com complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. Additionally, qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records will be considered for the position in accordance with applicable state and local laws.

title: Community Manager Trabajo Remoto
description:
About the job

Estamos en búsqueda de un(a) Community Manager de Recursos Humanos y Administración para apoyar en la gestión de la comunicación digital y el fortalecimiento de la imagen organizacional. La persona seleccionada participará en la creación y programación de contenido para redes sociales, difusión de vacantes, apoyo en campañas de atracción de talento, seguimiento de mensajes y consultas, actualización de contenido institucional y elaboración de reportes básicos sobre el desempeño de las publicaciones. Esta oportunidad es ideal para quienes desean adquirir experiencia en comunicación organizacional, reclutamiento digital, marca empleadora y administración de comunidades en línea. La modalidad de trabajo puede ser remota o híbrida; para quienes opten por el esquema híbrido, las actividades presenciales se realizan en la Zona Centro de la Ciudad de México, cerca de Paseo de la Reforma. Buscamos personas creativas, organizadas y con interés en el desarrollo del talento humano.
